Peter,
Tonight, I went head to head against Ben Ray Lujan’s DC partisan, political playbook and _**our New Mexico values campaign won the day!**_

It was an honor to fight for our New Mexico values live on TV, and I can’t wait to keep fighting for you everyday in the Senate. clean_body: | | | | Peter, Tonight, I went head to head against Ben Ray Lujan’s DC partisan, political playbook and our New Mexico values campaign won the day! It was an honor to fight for our New Mexico values live on TV, and I can’t wait to keep fighting for you everyday in the Senate. If you can, | | | Ben Ray Lujan thought he could recite DNC talking points about how Republicans are evil, but that’s not going to work in this race and it didn’t work in tonight’s debate. New Mexicans know that I am fighting for them and that I will do everything I can, even working across the aisle, to help build a safer, more prosperous New Mexico. | | | Thank you so much for your incredible support, Mark P.S. Tonight our New Mexico values campaign defeated Ben Ray Lujan’s DC partisan political playbook. He thought he could win by reciting DNC talking points about how Republicans are evil, but the people of New Mexico know me and my campaign. They know that I will work across the aisle to bring real change to our state. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MARK RONCHETTI FOR NEW MEXICO =

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Cheri Bustos and Betsy Dirksen Londrigan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
This one is personal.
I know you are swamped with requests for donations to candidates.
Thanks for all you have done.
But there is one ask that I will make of you in the closing days which is urgent and critically important.
The national Republican Party is waging a multi-million dollar smear campaign against Congresswoman Cheri Bustos and Congressional candidate Betsy Dirksen Londrigan.
I have seen the ads. They are disgusting displays of the worst in American politics.
I have known both of these women all of their lives. They are the best and their futures in public service give me hope for a new generation of value-driven leadership.
**[They need your help today. Pitch in $5 to their campaigns right now.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201016-bustos-londrigan?refcode=em201016i_1047&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
If you only have one last donation in you, please make it to Cheri and Betsy.
Thanks for always being there.
Dick Durbin

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201016-bustos-londrigan?refcode=em201016i_1047&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff45e2/42ab3cf4/665917fd/135d1242/2623793468/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff45e2/42ab3cf4/665917fd/135d1243/2623793468/VEsC/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")
Friends of Dick Durbin

101 W. Grand, Suite 200
Chicago, IL 60654

name: Dean Browning, Chairman
subject: Welcome to Common Sense Solutions Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CSSPAC
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Dear Patriot,
Thank you for deciding to take a stand for conservative values and to fight against the radical-left! Here at Common Sense Solutions, we work tirelessly to expose hidden hypocrisies and uncover the truth behind what drives Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and other socialists in the Democrat party. We want to hold Elected Officials accountable, whether they are incumbents or running for office for the first time. CSS Pac seeks to develop and implement conservative, common-sense solutions that will keep Pennsylvania and America Great and build a bright future for all. Businessman and conservative, Dean Browning chairs CSS Pac. Dean worked in the private sector for over 40 years. After retiring, Dean wanted to work to put in place conservative policies that champion the individual and that have been successful in creating an economy that provides unlimited opportunities for everyone. Now, more than ever, we need to protect our economy and those long-standing conservative values that have helped to build such a great country. We are under attack by Leftists such as Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and AOC who seek to bolster the power of the government at the expense of hard-working Americans like yourself. CSS Pac will not back down from any fight that the Radical Left throws at us, and we will not stop until the job is done! We are honored to have you become a part of our team. For Freedom,
CSSPAC Staff
---

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: SENATOR LOEFFLER ANNOUNCES THIRD "ALL ABOUT GEORGIA" STATEWIDE TOUR
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, OCTOBER 19, 2020
SENATOR LOEFFLER ANNOUNCES THIRD "ALL ABOUT GEORGIA" STATEWIDE TOUR
ATLANTA - Today, political outsider and conservative businesswoman Kelly Loeffler announced her third All About Georgia Statewide Recess Tour - a statewide tour of over a dozen counties that will run from October 28 to October 31. The Tour, which will also feature a number of surrogates, will give voters an opportunity to hear directly from Kelly Loeffler about her conservative vision and record of results before Election Day on November 3.
As the only candidate to complete two statewide tours - and as the only candidate organized in all 159 counties, with a strong advantage in endorsements on the local, state and national levels - Senator Loeffler continues to lead her opponents in both polling and grassroots momentum ahead of November. | Friend,
As a reminder, you're invited to join Senator Kelly Loeffler - and a lineup of special guests - to celebrate the results of the November 3 election at our Election Night Party!
After the polls close, we'll gather together with supporters from across the state to watch the returns roll in - and to celebrate the big victories of Senator Loeffler, President Trump, and Republicans up and down the ballot.
You, your friends, and your family are all invited to attend at no cost. Hors d'oeuvres and cash bar will be provided, and parking is available on-site in the Highland Dr. parking deck.
---
| | | [RSVP TODAY!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TtfeVrdyAxcnlXKqyYZvAEzNU-foEqwV7aLt8XKZ9C7VCzyBxnRCy-jTtz8h_xNzez8GEX3XRnVvfwHe7gw1UPQmcrIGCAdHvudynC8E6b0xUgfcvPaMqD_5RU61crcVzniIb-twFQrSNkknI4T-Vwc80x9-SNL6GGWKh8T-A2BbKQlRLTJzZ1IOQTXI964t&c=dm15yIVgEJZ8HwqAHpVbpeE9eonD7Vv0-L75xu2tixq-b8SNOQaKSg==&ch=3JW5THbEsA959-Zkth-bBD-YFDZZ8BHWCaYmKQyS1S5ywFT1UdsRfg==)
---
| Check out the event details above, and please share the RSVP link with friends and neighbors who might be interested in attending. If you have any questions about the event, feel free to email [caitlin@kellyforsenate.com](mailto:caitlin@kellyforsenate.com).
See you there!
Team Kelly

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Senator Ed Markey <campaign@siegelfortexas.org>
Date: Sun, Oct 18, 2020 at 6:32 PM
Subject: This moment requires bold solutions
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20502573/257239367/997664260?refcode=SGL_EM_FR_201019_MarkeyBump_U2_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjFhMDViMC0yMDEyLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1XeIAz2hJDR1dkUQ9f7GdzqSmYVDU413RTvpH7qnIL8=)
Friend, our planet is facing an existential threat. In the face of a climate crisis, growing wealth inequality, and millions of uninsured Americans, progressives are stepping forward to offer the bold solutions that working people desperately need.
If we’re going to pass a Green New Deal and our bold progressive agenda, then I need more allies in Congress. **That’s why I’m so proud to endorse Mike Siegel for Congress.**
Mike is a true progressive. He understands that our planet is running out of time, and there are no emergency rooms for planets. He’s all-in to fight alongside me in Washington to pass the Green New Deal, but first, he needs our help to win his race in Texas.
[**If you’re all-in to fight for bold solutions and a brighter future, make a donation today to help Mike oust his Republican opponent and flip this district.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20502574/257239368/997664260?refcode=SGL_EM_FR_201019_MarkeyBump_U2_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjFhMDViMC0yMDEyLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1XeIAz2hJDR1dkUQ9f7GdzqSmYVDU413RTvpH7qnIL8=)

| | [Chip in →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20502575/257239369/997664260?refcode=SGL_EM_FR_201019_MarkeyBump_U2_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjFhMDViMC0yMDEyLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1XeIAz2hJDR1dkUQ9f7GdzqSmYVDU413RTvpH7qnIL8=)
---

**His opponent is one of Big Oil’s favorite Republicans.** He is one of the largest investors in fossil fuels in Congress, and he rakes in tons of corporate PAC money from his special interest allies.
Winning in TX-10 would send a powerful message to the fossil fuel lobby that their days of buying control of Congress are over. We can make clear that the Green New Deal is a popular and winning issue even in the oil and gas industry’s backyard.
Mike Siegel has spent his career advocating for the most vulnerable among us, and he will continue that fight in Congress. He will put the needs of working people first — not special interests.
[**Polling shows this race will be won by razor-thin margins, will you chip in today to help Mike Siegel come out on top?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20502576/257239370/997664260?refcode=SGL_EM_FR_201019_MarkeyBump_U2_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjFhMDViMC0yMDEyLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1XeIAz2hJDR1dkUQ9f7GdzqSmYVDU413RTvpH7qnIL8=)

clean_body: | = | | Friend, I’m reaching out because I was wondering if you had the chance to read Ed’s message about our race. I couldn’t be more honored to have the endorsement of someone like Ed — he’s fighting every day for a better future for us all, and I can’t wait to join him. = | | | = \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Senator Ed Markey <campaign@siegelfortexas.org> Date: Sun, Oct 18, 2020 at 6:32 PM Subject: This moment requires bold solutions To: dpwillis67@gmail.com = Friend, our planet is facing an existential threat. In the face of a climate crisis, growing wealth inequality, and millions of uninsured Americans, progressives are stepping forward to offer the bold solutions that working people desperately need. If we’re going to pass a Green New Deal and our bold progressive agenda, then I need more allies in Congress. That’s why I’m so proud to endorse Mike Siegel for Congress. Mike is a true progressive. He understands that our planet is running out of time, and there are no emergency rooms for planets. He’s all-in to fight alongside me in Washington to pass the Green New Deal, but first, he needs our help to win his race in Texas. = | | = His opponent is one of Big Oil’s favorite Republicans. He is one of the largest investors in fossil fuels in Congress, and he rakes in tons of corporate PAC money from his special interest allies. Winning in TX-10 would send a powerful message to the fossil fuel lobby that their days of buying control of Congress are over. We can make clear that the Green New Deal is a popular and winning issue even in the oil and gas industry’s backyard. Mike Siegel has spent his career advocating for the most vulnerable among us, and he will continue that fight in Congress. He will put the needs of working people first — not special interests. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Ed Markey U.S. Senator, Massachusetts | | If you'd like to support Mike Siegel for Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, click . | Paid for by Mike Siegel for Congress Mike Siegel for Congress PO Box 2409 Austin, Texas 78701 United States mailto:siegel@siegelfortexas.org

Hey Peter,

I’m going to cut right to the chase.

We’re 55 donations short of my goal to help protect the Republican Senate majority. **[Can you step up and donate before midnight to help us fight off the Left?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=aac1ceb653f74db1b1effad3655eaf32&_e=KFXL6Z9ASk0qA0dmIOGrVxjHUOnkEynGeFTVGZVDKOdgaQd2BoTdtLZxeL7P72JG7xaRE_UdkDvqoIabc6zJvKfC-CamGq3LH7IOD7876JHjLpatQ4Y6x2dE1YjP6wREaZ0Wr9P0YzOx1mCeuGehjTZ-MsQ7VRq5VYu7NQcfAQX83ylYzxCGPKZqaoHlVEltj_MfDMaWvn8PXYmyVflB8IZFkc9CCUQsKucIBzWyynFn_UCycnWvDPQDAHjuNs9HG_PmQNmvKfsas4OSyL103KuLZmWaUfLu9QK9jpdim8gjAWuZfmcO7ABKh9BNq8R66XGg1sD5Tf1SuQSKAjcibcZk0vN1dl-FOH10Xw6Vc4LS89CcEegiX5hR3VSfGvv-u_bUELI4tuF2av_4sOhysw%3D%3D)**

President Obama and Chuck Schumer are raising and spending tens of millions of dollars to flip the Senate this cycle, and one of their top targets is my good friend Senator Steve Daines from Montana.

It’s vital we do everything we can from now until Election Day to help conservatives like Steve. **[We need your help to hold the U.S. Senate majority.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=aac1ceb653f74db1b1effad3655eaf32&_e=KFXL6Z9ASk0qA0dmIOGrVxjHUOnkEynGeFTVGZVDKOdgaQd2BoTdtLZxeL7P72JG7xaRE_UdkDvqoIabc6zJvKfC-CamGq3LH7IOD7876JHjLpatQ4Y6x2dE1YjP6wREaZ0Wr9P0YzOx1mCeuGehjTZ-MsQ7VRq5VYu7NQcfAQX83ylYzxCGPKZqaoHlVElt516xgbvAiuTGq7H1sfXTFa9T2iVu3cUoMxzOBUWXD8U2A-l9mFsoIqsBIn7TwNQhKHFHgGJn7iEyq0KAEGCaJITnY7KGIGmTQ2DNPBMyggx3f7XRc6eJigK6PfUMy8lQx9HHq5O7BTE5E30ef8iCL6Yvr3UN0Dl2gk3mqK-ZNcM77YOeWuDwrJSPN4StDkSqMbHEflmvm_m5DTWEnY3u_g%3D%3D)**

| [**HELP US PROTECT THE SENATE MAJORITY ->**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=aac1ceb653f74db1b1effad3655eaf32&_e=KFXL6Z9ASk0qA0dmIOGrVxjHUOnkEynGeFTVGZVDKOdgaQd2BoTdtLZxeL7P72JG7xaRE_UdkDvqoIabc6zJvKfC-CamGq3LH7IOD7876JHjLpatQ4Y6x2dE1YjP6wREaZ0Wr9P0YzOx1mCeuGehjTZ-MsQ7VRq5VYu7NQcfAQX83ylYzxCGPKZqaoHlVEltPy7WptbbnyBrWiAwcdYDMgrRGBkirfxmaDbJYhBUSFODj57ckSryBw3eWpyeJmvHrCmWm0THAI_7Q8bgray-RjWb_l9qvF5myxYRofd8yDnL1VAOswhanK6myVZPOBCCw7hMe1OOndHtEfhtRa4l8sljPNYgPChIshV_YzzbLMUC4fyOf85VOuodWrnHo9suxZySqg6fZJU50fKj4IYNgg%3D%3D)

Obama and Schumer know they only need to flip four seats to win the majority. Normally I wouldn’t be too concerned, but Steve and I have been consistently outraised this year by our liberal Democrat opponents.

The Left’s plan of targeting red states is working, and we need your help.

**[Please, do anything you can right now to support both of our critical re-elections. Without Steve, the Republican Senate majority is lost.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=aac1ceb653f74db1b1effad3655eaf32&_e=KFXL6Z9ASk0qA0dmIOGrVxjHUOnkEynGeFTVGZVDKOdgaQd2BoTdtLZxeL7P72JG7xaRE_UdkDvqoIabc6zJvKfC-CamGq3LH7IOD7876JHjLpatQ4Y6x2dE1YjP6wREaZ0Wr9P0YzOx1mCeuGehjTZ-MsQ7VRq5VYu7NQcfAQX83ylYzxCGPKZqaoHlVEltc-r_D-96J4DJm5F4TX5TfRNPpDaL2IQxHsDbZgKuKt4YjKQDD6-CanWVkssYXRXRnt9f-9ufhzdSoryQdmaARZHd45IJDEKiUcMWHHVYIrSSMcqm7TUvtrLxri2XulJKYf7FvGhZjn0hynL98G_F9Ghqi0RtnKXbPP9uVYHZH6qYXOqxe8soU0hvw7qQe4Jg0S9o3vcoOXxWjHQ-TjrZhg%3D%3D)**

[**STAND WITH STEVE DAINES AND LINDSEY GRAHAM ->**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=aac1ceb653f74db1b1effad3655eaf32&_e=KFXL6Z9ASk0qA0dmIOGrVxjHUOnkEynGeFTVGZVDKOdgaQd2BoTdtLZxeL7P72JG7xaRE_UdkDvqoIabc6zJvKfC-CamGq3LH7IOD7876JHjLpatQ4Y6x2dE1YjP6wREaZ0Wr9P0YzOx1mCeuGehjTZ-MsQ7VRq5VYu7NQcfAQX83ylYzxCGPKZqaoHlVEltKc8I_kf3F7Zza0SqG1Eada5HNVB_OV20cSklms9Ub2B6sh4yPlDKPrnl5TZEqayG1WI37-WZ6QtTukpzhmo9K6UlcLAoAJTrCp-RFIvmahk3FnGakiuX1IpAFtPXoQK-4Tfpy3akkwiiDOGqDVVVweoVWky74sxkqip_fy0TPICAti5uOl6YFrHO8cG3ilU-y4dTwXZh1LPnVBWvjHloNQ%3D%3D)

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

P.S. **[The donation you make today will be split to help Steve Daines in Montana and my campaign in South Carolina.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=aac1ceb653f74db1b1effad3655eaf32&_e=KFXL6Z9ASk0qA0dmIOGrVxjHUOnkEynGeFTVGZVDKOdgaQd2BoTdtLZxeL7P72JG7xaRE_UdkDvqoIabc6zJvKfC-CamGq3LH7IOD7876JHjLpatQ4Y6x2dE1YjP6wREaZ0Wr9P0YzOx1mCeuGehjTZ-MsQ7VRq5VYu7NQcfAQX83ylYzxCGPKZqaoHlVEltYC_wMxyYPZ3VJcyAKTOJ6gBYW1Wshn_xOr0bUhsq-LX2LfsJ299x0VGYfEUBQGKbCNSUpzt1s_nR3Ea3u7zDB4ntAr3h3AP967cIx_P-0I-xIwjdsBEk05r5Jxa76Cj4Bz59w0JBTj3Tx82PPDKs-g4P0eqv4t9lJ2PqgneqskzyEgPc0Hgke21Zc7DDXkHgKYwbONRKpNn-RNy4hbVDKw%3D%3D)** Both of our races are critical to keeping our GOP Senate majority, so thank you for stepping up to help.

_Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. We’re urging all of Jim’s supporters to take advantage of the opportunity to vote early, before Election Day. You can avoid the lines on November 3rd, and help us build an early lead! Please cast your vote as soon as possible – whether you plan to vote early, or to go out and vote on Election Day. We have to defeat radical leftist Lauren Underwood and flip this seat RED! Thank you for ALL your support in this race, Peter. \- Team Oberweis | | Paid for by Jim 2020 Committee id:2020-10-15-19:40:13:809t

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund
subject: Continue highlighting the Supreme Court & Election! Week of Oct. 19th Action Items
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEA PARTY PATRIOTS CITIZENS FUND
body:
| |
---
The two major themes this week are continuing to push for a swift confirmation of Amy Coney Barrett – the timeline is short, it must be done before the election – and working to re-elect President Trump.

**Also, here’s what we know about the process now that the hearings have ended.** From the Senate Judiciary: “Last Thursday morning the Committee also held its first markup for Judge Barrett during which time it held over her nomination and set a time certain to vote to report her out of Committee: 1:00 pm on October 22, 2020. Unsurprisingly the Democrats played procedural games at the outset of the markup, attempting to deny the Committee a quorum with which to transact business just like Sen. Schumer promised. For a variety of reasons, they failed. The vote will be taken next Thursday at which point Judge Barrett will be reported to the Floor.”

We’ve also heard that it is likely that the final floor vote will not actually occur until October 29th.

_Note: in order to share the links below, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
Supreme Court Action
****PRIORITY #1** Keep Calling your Senators!**
Please continue to call your Senators and tell them that Judge Barrett deserves a fair hearing and urge them to vote yes to confirm her now, without delay. It doesn’t matter if they are Republican or Democrat, they all need to hear this message again and again.

So, we must keep calling, as we know Democrats will do whatever they can to delay, delay, delay, and Oct. 29th – the likely floor vote day – is only four days before Election Day.
**Sample Script**
_Hi, my name is**[Your Name]** , and I live in **[City, State]**. I’m calling to urge the Senator to support Amy Coney Barrett’s nomination and to confirm her quickly, without delay. Thank you!_
To call your Senators, no matter the party, simply dial [(202) 224-3121](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjkzLWYwZTBiNDZlMzEzNTQxYTZhN2I1NDJkYjk1NDNjMGQy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AdGVsOjIwMjIyNDMxMjE_bWlkPTQyODQyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=GlDdNviqdMbB0wwPlx8w3Q "tel:2022243121") and ask for your Senator by name and you will be connected. If you need to look up the names of your Senators, use the map on this page. Just click on your state and it will show you your Senators.
****PRIORITY #2** Use & Share Our Support Amy Resources**
You can use the tools contained [on our hub page](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjkzLWYwZTBiNDZlMzEzNTQxYTZhN2I1NDJkYjk1NDNjMGQy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3VwcG9ydC1iYXJyZXR0Lz9taWQ9NDI4NDImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=QXz2ya2efTcltAxkkegZjg) to help you take action. We have a petition, a toolkit, and social media posts that you can use to help push the Senate to confirm Amy quickly. Please share the links to the hub page, the petition, and the toolkit with others!
[SIGN THE PETITION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjkzLWYwZTBiNDZlMzEzNTQxYTZhN2I1NDJkYjk1NDNjMGQy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3VwcG9ydC1iYXJyZXR0Lz9taWQ9NDI4NDImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=bOOP4bVXR6eyqPUBgLjgoQ)
**Schedule your sign waving events now!**
The three remaining sign waving dates are listed below, but feel free to add more dates if you’d like – the more the better!

If you organize any events, email us the details (date, time, location, and contact information we can list), and we can send an email to people in your area to help you spread the word. Email us at [support@teapartypatriots.org](mailto:support@teapartypatriots.org "support@teapartypatriots.org").
* **Thursday, October 22nd**
* **Thursday, October 29th** _– Day of likely floor vote for ACB’s confirmation_
* **Monday, November 2nd** – _Day before Election Day_

Sample Amy Coney Barrett Sign Messages:
* Fill the Seat Now!
* Confirm Amy Coney Barrett now!
* Amy Coney Barrett loves the Constitution! Fill the Seat Now!
* #ConfirmAmy
* America supports Amy Coney Barrett!

**Sign up for our Supreme Court Action Coalition Group**
If you are receiving “Supreme Court Defenders” emails, you are already signed up for this list. If you didn’t receive that email, then you will want to make sure you get signed up for the coalition group that will work to support President Trump’s SCOTUS nominee. You will receive emails with messaging, news, action items, and more that are only about this Supreme Court seat fight.
[SIGN UP FOR THE GOOGLE GROUP](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjkzLWYwZTBiNDZlMzEzNTQxYTZhN2I1NDJkYjk1NDNjMGQy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ncm91cHMuZ29vZ2xlLmNvbS9hL3RlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnL2ZvcnVtLz9taWQ9NDI4NDImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIyFmb3J1bS9zY290dXNkZWZlbmRlcnMvam9pbg&K=59ZgnmSrSk3p1xfvrtNu8Q)
**Amplify Messaging**
We all need to help to dispute and refute the false notion that the entire nation’s health care is going to disappear if Amy Coney Barrett is confirmed. This was one of the Democrats’ obvious tactics last week during the hearings. It’s not so much that they care about how a Justice Barrett would rule on Obamacare. It’s more that they are afraid of a Constitutionalist being appointed to the Supreme Court, and they want to use people’s fear of losing health care to help Joe Biden win the election.

Here is a good article about this issue: **[No, Confirming Judge Barrett Won’t Cause Millions to Lose Health Care](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjkzLWYwZTBiNDZlMzEzNTQxYTZhN2I1NDJkYjk1NDNjMGQy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90aGVmZWRlcmFsaXN0LmNvbS8yMDIwLzEwLzE0L25vLWNvbmZpcm1pbmctanVkZ2UtYmFycmV0dC13b250LWNhdXNlLW1pbGxpb25zLXRvLWxvc2UtaGVhbHRoLWNhcmUvP21pZD00Mjg0MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=Qg3ubyUbGpv45MsJZcIz2w).**

We also need to help amplify the fact that the Democrats want to eliminate the filibuster and increase the court size so that Americans understand everything is about power for the left, and that this is what they intend to do if given the chance.

Articles on these issues:
* [Why Democrats’ Threat to Abolish the Filibuster Means the End of the United States as we Know It](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjkzLWYwZTBiNDZlMzEzNTQxYTZhN2I1NDJkYjk1NDNjMGQy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90b3duaGFsbC5jb20vY29sdW1uaXN0cy9qb2hucmxvdHRqci8yMDIwLzEwLzAxL3doeS1kZW1vY3JhdHMtdGhyZWF0LXRvLWFib2xpc2gtdGhlLWZpbGlidXN0ZXItbWVhbnMtdGhlLWVuZC1vZi10aGUtdW5pdGVkLXN0YXRlcy1hcy13ZS1rbm93LWl0LW4yNTc3MjYwP21pZD00Mjg0MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=8J2Sg97jHzACuEapMmDnDg)
* [Killing the filibuster would be a power grab by Democrats](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjkzLWYwZTBiNDZlMzEzNTQxYTZhN2I1NDJkYjk1NDNjMGQy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbmV4YW1pbmVyLmNvbS9vcGluaW9uL2VkaXRvcmlhbHMva2lsbGluZy10aGUtZmlsaWJ1c3Rlci13b3VsZC1iZS1hLXBvd2VyLWdyYWItYnktZGVtb2NyYXRzP21pZD00Mjg0MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=Wc4h0AWrWHXc6yBVoEfheQ)
* [Ted Cruz Flips Script, Uses Democrats’ Own Words To Slam the Idea of Court Packing](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjkzLWYwZTBiNDZlMzEzNTQxYTZhN2I1NDJkYjk1NDNjMGQy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGF0cmlvdHByb2plY3QuY29tL3RlZC1jcnV6LWZsaXBzLXNjcmlwdC11c2VzLWRlbW9jcmF0cy13b3Jkcy1zbGFtLWlkZWEtY291cnQtcGFja2luZy8_bWlkPTQyODQyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=aK7xdUkNIDuBJDjfOpOjNA)
* [Dennis Prager: If Dems Pack the Court, We’ll Face a 31-Justice SCOTUS by 2040](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjkzLWYwZTBiNDZlMzEzNTQxYTZhN2I1NDJkYjk1NDNjMGQy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGF0cmlvdHByb2plY3QuY29tL2Rlbm5pcy1wcmFnZXItZGVtcy1wYWNrLWNvdXJ0LWZhY2UtMzEtanVzdGljZS1zY290dXMtMjA0MC8_bWlkPTQyODQyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=pv61gKyNnpUcTnxBe4s-SA)
* [Biden Dodges Court-Packing Question by Attempting To Deceptively Redefine the Term](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjkzLWYwZTBiNDZlMzEzNTQxYTZhN2I1NDJkYjk1NDNjMGQy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGF0cmlvdHByb2plY3QuY29tL2JpZGVuLWRvZGdlcy1jb3VydC1wYWNraW5nLXF1ZXN0aW9uLWF0dGVtcHRpbmctZGVjZXB0aXZlbHktcmVkZWZpbmUtdGVybS8_bWlkPTQyODQyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=Hk5Kf8xpxh8oFItJ7Gc-hA)
* [Chuck Schumer Admits He’d ‘Love’ To Add DC and Puerto Rico as States To Boost Dems in Senate](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjkzLWYwZTBiNDZlMzEzNTQxYTZhN2I1NDJkYjk1NDNjMGQy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGF0cmlvdHByb2plY3QuY29tL2NodWNrLXNjaHVtZXItYWRtaXRzLWxvdmUtYWRkLWRjLXB1ZXJ0by1yaWNvLXN0YXRlcy1ib29zdC1kZW1zLXNlbmF0ZS8_bWlkPTQyODQyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=nIcqyVomXcTvJDDTH02k6A)

**Write & Submit Letters to the Editor Locally**
Please write and submit letters to the editor of your local newspaper expressing support for Amy and asking others to call your state’s Senators urging them to support her confirmation without delay. If you need help writing a letter to the editor, you can the [sample letter to the editor in our toolkit](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjkzLWYwZTBiNDZlMzEzNTQxYTZhN2I1NDJkYjk1NDNjMGQy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTE%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1N1cHBvcnRfQmFycmV0dF9Ib3dfVG9fR3VpZGUucGRmP21pZD00Mjg0MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=VnM0ahlczIJgrJ7MCR2H_A), or check [ConfirmAmy.com](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjkzLWYwZTBiNDZlMzEzNTQxYTZhN2I1NDJkYjk1NDNjMGQy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTI%3A%3AaHR0cDovL2NvbmZpcm1hbXkuY29tLz9taWQ9NDI4NDImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=o67WHRrMAOu3N-sc83UdSw) for facts you can use to craft your own letter. If. You get one placed, please send us the link (if it’s online) or a picture of it (if it’s in the hard copy of the newspaper) to [support@teapartypatriots.org](mailto:support@teapartypatriots.org "support@teapartypatriots.org").

Get Out the Vote Action
Please sign up to text message voters and help reelect President Trump! It’s so easy!

1. **To get started go to:[tpp.us/txt](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjkzLWYwZTBiNDZlMzEzNTQxYTZhN2I1NDJkYjk1NDNjMGQy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTM%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvY2l0aXplbnNmdW5kL3RleHQydm90ZS8_bWlkPTQyODQyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=8_Lg-s8TgYRbGHLx8gJFtA) **– fill out the very short form and press the “Start Texting” button! We recommend using your phone to sign up as you will be using your phone to do the text messaging.

2. **You will get a text message after you’ve signed up.** Click the link on your cell phone and you’ll be moved through the process. Once you send a text to the voter, go back to your browser (on your cell phone) to send the next text.

**If you need additional instructions[you can look through this guide](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjkzLWYwZTBiNDZlMzEzNTQxYTZhN2I1NDJkYjk1NDNjMGQy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzLzIwMjBQMlBUZXh0aW5nSW5zdHJ1Y3Rpb25zLnBkZj9taWQ9NDI4NDImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=ZcLJfAl56yJ1S5XLgbKWoA).** But it is very easy to sign up and start texting voters now. You can text voters every day until 8:30pm ET.
[START TEXTING](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjkzLWYwZTBiNDZlMzEzNTQxYTZhN2I1NDJkYjk1NDNjMGQy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTU%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvY2l0aXplbnNmdW5kL3RleHQydm90ZS8_bWlkPTQyODQyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=Y-wXv8R08LupUQ58Js25YQ)

Pledge to Vote in Person
We’ve now seen multiple instances of large piles of ballots being found in dumpsters, and post office employees being arrested. If you are able, please vote in person, and sign this pledge.

Read this article about ways to secure your ballot/vote: **[How to Secure Your Vote and Minimize the Impact of Zombie Voters](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjkzLWYwZTBiNDZlMzEzNTQxYTZhN2I1NDJkYjk1NDNjMGQy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTY%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9wam1lZGlhLmNvbS9lbGVjdGlvbi9zYXJhaC1ob3l0LzIwMjAvMTAvMTIvaG93LXRvLXNlY3VyZS15b3VyLXZvdGUtYW5kLW1pbmltaXplLXRoZS1pbXBhY3Qtb2Ytem9tYmllLXZvdGVycy1uMTA0MTgzMD9taWQ9NDI4NDImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=_Y5HzRVBhI-uLdKDWnAJqg)**

**NOTE:** If you are high-risk and need to stay away from public places for your health, or you live in a state where there is no in-person voting at all (like Washington state), this does not apply to you.
[PLEDGE TO VOTE IN PERSON](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjkzLWYwZTBiNDZlMzEzNTQxYTZhN2I1NDJkYjk1NDNjMGQy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTc%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly92b3RlaW5wZXJzb24uYWN0LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnLz9taWQ9NDI4NDImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=XsPg_oA1QEO-ZQaeI8_t_A)
|

Make Real Civics Education a Priority Again
Week of October 19th

Keep an eye out every week for a new activity or book or lesson to bring real civics back to our children.

**This week, we are listening (or you can read the transcript) to a conversation between Hugh Hewitt, Hillsdale College’s President Dr. Larry Arnn, Professor Wilfred McClay from Hillsdale, and Hilldsale’s Director of Online Learning Kyle Murnen. It’s called,[“The Great American Story – Part I.”](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjkzLWYwZTBiNDZlMzEzNTQxYTZhN2I1NDJkYjk1NDNjMGQy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ibG9nLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvb25saW5lLWNvdXJzZXMvdGhlLWdyZWF0LWFtZXJpY2FuLXN0b3J5LXBhcnQtaT9taWQ9NDI4NDImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=70M0ph7iFpQhbHjOeZMUvg)**

With the election approaching fast, and one side claiming that America is evil, we thought it appropriate to listen to a discussion about the Great American Story, and the hopeful, incredible country and story America has provided to so many millions of people throughout its history.

You can listen to it on a car ride, or at home together as a family, and discuss the history that is brought up, and why America is the Land of Hope.
|
---
Thank you!

In liberty,

Jenny Beth

clean_body: | | The two major themes this week are continuing to push for a swift confirmation of Amy Coney Barrett – the timeline is short, it must be done before the election – and working to re-elect President Trump. Also, here’s what we know about the process now that the hearings have ended. From the Senate Judiciary: “Last Thursday morning the Committee also held its first markup for Judge Barrett during which time it held over her nomination and set a time certain to vote to report her out of Committee: 1:00 pm on October 22, 2020. Unsurprisingly the Democrats played procedural games at the outset of the markup, attempting to deny the Committee a quorum with which to transact business just like Sen. Schumer promised. For a variety of reasons, they failed. The vote will be taken next Thursday at which point Judge Barrett will be reported to the Floor.” We’ve also heard that it is likely that the final floor vote will not actually occur until October 29th. Note: in order to share the links below, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it. | Supreme Court Action **PRIORITY #1 Keep Calling your Senators! Please continue to call your Senators and tell them that Judge Barrett deserves a fair hearing and urge them to vote yes to confirm her now, without delay. It doesn’t matter if they are Republican or Democrat, they all need to hear this message again and again. So, we must keep calling, as we know Democrats will do whatever they can to delay, delay, delay, and Oct. 29th – the likely floor vote day – is only four days before Election Day. Sample Script Hi, my name is[Your Name] , and I live in [City, State]. I’m calling to urge the Senator to support Amy Coney Barrett’s nomination and to confirm her quickly, without delay. Thank you! To call your Senators, no matter the party, simply dial "tel:2022243121" and ask for your Senator by name and you will be connected. If you need to look up the names of your Senators, use the map on this page. Just click on your state and it will show you your Senators. PRIORITY #2 Use & Share Our Support Amy Resources You can use the tools contained to help you take action. We have a petition, a toolkit, and social media posts that you can use to help push the Senate to confirm Amy quickly. Please share the links to the hub page, the petition, and the toolkit with others! Schedule your sign waving events now! The three remaining sign waving dates are listed below, but feel free to add more dates if you’d like – the more the better! If you organize any events, email us the details (date, time, location, and contact information we can list), and we can send an email to people in your area to help you spread the word. Email us at mailto:support@teapartypatriots.org "support@teapartypatriots.org". Thursday, October 22nd Thursday, October 29th – Day of likely floor vote for ACB’s confirmation Monday, November 2nd – Day before Election Day Sample Amy Coney Barrett Sign Messages: Fill the Seat Now! Confirm Amy Coney Barrett now! Amy Coney Barrett loves the Constitution! Fill the Seat Now! #ConfirmAmy America supports Amy Coney Barrett! Sign up for our Supreme Court Action Coalition Group If you are receiving “Supreme Court Defenders” emails, you are already signed up for this list. If you didn’t receive that email, then you will want to make sure you get signed up for the coalition group that will work to support President Trump’s SCOTUS nominee. You will receive emails with messaging, news, action items, and more that are only about this Supreme Court seat fight. Amplify Messaging We all need to help to dispute and refute the false notion that the entire nation’s health care is going to disappear if Amy Coney Barrett is confirmed. This was one of the Democrats’ obvious tactics last week during the hearings. It’s not so much that they care about how a Justice Barrett would rule on Obamacare. It’s more that they are afraid of a Constitutionalist being appointed to the Supreme Court, and they want to use people’s fear of losing health care to help Joe Biden win the election. Here is a good article about this issue: . We also need to help amplify the fact that the Democrats want to eliminate the filibuster and increase the court size so that Americans understand everything is about power for the left, and that this is what they intend to do if given the chance. Articles on these issues: Write & Submit Letters to the Editor Locally Please write and submit letters to the editor of your local newspaper expressing support for Amy and asking others to call your state’s Senators urging them to support her confirmation without delay. If you need help writing a letter to the editor, you can the , or check for facts you can use to craft your own letter. If. You get one placed, please send us the link (if it’s online) or a picture of it (if it’s in the hard copy of the newspaper) to mailto:support@teapartypatriots.org "support@teapartypatriots.org". | Get Out the Vote Action Please sign up to text message voters and help reelect President Trump! It’s so easy! 1. To get started go to: – fill out the very short form and press the “Start Texting” button! We recommend using your phone to sign up as you will be using your phone to do the text messaging. 2. You will get a text message after you’ve signed up. Click the link on your cell phone and you’ll be moved through the process. Once you send a text to the voter, go back to your browser (on your cell phone) to send the next text. If you need additional instructions. But it is very easy to sign up and start texting voters now. You can text voters every day until 8:30pm ET. | Pledge to Vote in Person We’ve now seen multiple instances of large piles of ballots being found in dumpsters, and post office employees being arrested. If you are able, please vote in person, and sign this pledge. Read this article about ways to secure your ballot/vote: NOTE: If you are high-risk and need to stay away from public places for your health, or you live in a state where there is no in-person voting at all (like Washington state), this does not apply to you. | Make Real Civics Education a Priority Again Week of October 19th Keep an eye out every week for a new activity or book or lesson to bring real civics back to our children. This week, we are listening (or you can read the transcript) to a conversation between Hugh Hewitt, Hillsdale College’s President Dr. Larry Arnn, Professor Wilfred McClay from Hillsdale, and Hilldsale’s Director of Online Learning Kyle Murnen. It’s called, With the election approaching fast, and one side claiming that America is evil, we thought it appropriate to listen to a discussion about the Great American Story, and the hopeful, incredible country and story America has provided to so many millions of people throughout its history. You can listen to it on a car ride, or at home together as a family, and discuss the history that is brought up, and why America is the Land of Hope. | Thank you! In liberty, Jenny Beth | PAID FOR BY TEA PARTY PATRIOTS CITIZENS FUND. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. © 2020 2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Suite 116-328 Woodstock, GA 30189 | **

body:
[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/56623802:sl1SFGKrN:m:1:1155937413:DBAB59B06C95C591E3AE9514417298BA:r "Amy Coney Barrett") My name is Josh Hawley, I am a Senator from the great state of Missouri, and I sit on the Senate Judiciary Committee. I had a front-row view of the Democrat hypocrisy, and religious persecution as Judge Amy Coney Barrett sat before Senators on both sides of the aisle during her confirmation hearing. **While Joe Biden says the voters don't deserve to know whether they will pack the court if elected,_liberal Senators have said that Amy Coney Barrett is too Catholic to be on the Supreme court._** **Nancy Pelosi herself uses her Catholic faith as a shield from any criticism during the impeachment hearings, but for someone nominated by President Trump, her faith in God is "dangerous."** Our nation was founded by pilgrims escaping religious persecution, and I will never sit by and watch as Americans are discriminated against for their religion. **[I haven't forgotten our principals, and if you haven't either, I need you to make an immediate donation to my Senate campaign.](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/56623802:sl1SFGKrN:m:1:1155937413:DBAB59B06C95C591E3AE9514417298BA:r "I haven't forgotten our principals, and if you haven't either, I
need you to make an immediate donation to my Senate campaign.")** As I said in the hearings, this argument attempts to bring back an old standard that the Constitution forbids in Article 6, which is a religious test. When you tell somebody that they're too Catholic to be on the bench, when you tell them they're going to be a Catholic judge -- not an American judge -- that's bigotry, plain and simple. **[It's time we hold Democrats accountable for their hypocrisy and stop allowing them to discriminate against American citizens based on religion.](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/56623802:sl1SFGKrN:m:1:1155937413:DBAB59B06C95C591E3AE9514417298BA:r "It's time we hold Democrats accountable for their hypocrisy and
stop allowing them to discriminate against American citizens based on religion.")** | | [HOLD DEMOCRATS ACCOUNTABLE >>>](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/56623802:sl1SFGKrN:m:1:1155937413:DBAB59B06C95C591E3AE9514417298BA:r "HOLD DEMOCRATS ACCOUNTABLE")
---
Amy Coney Barrett is a pro-Constitution conservative with an outstanding record. That's what we deserve in a Supreme Court justice, and both she and the American people deserve better than what we've seen coming from the Left.
Chuck Schumer and the rest of the Senate Democrats are merely trying to delay the Senate from fulfilling their constitutional duty. I will always be at the front of a fight for the Constitution.
**[My fight to expose the Left's bigotry and to abide by the Constitution is going to make me a target. That is why I need every conservative reading this email to make an immediate donation to my re-election campaign.](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/56623802:sl1SFGKrN:m:1:1155937413:DBAB59B06C95C591E3AE9514417298BA:r "My fight to expose the Left's bigotry and to abide by the
Constitution is going to make me a target. That is why I need every conservative reading this email to make an immediate donation to my re-election
campaign.")**
| [HOLD DEMOCRATS ACCOUNTABLE >>>](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/56623802:sl1SFGKrN:m:1:1155937413:DBAB59B06C95C591E3AE9514417298BA:r "HOLD DEMOCRATS
ACCOUNTABLE")
---
I urge all my Democrat colleagues to reject attacks on her faith publicly and abstain from anti-Catholic rhetoric. President Trump made a strong pick, and I look forward to confirming her as the next Justice on the United States Supreme Court.
Thank you for fulfilling your responsibility as an American and standing up for our founding principles.
Thank you for your support.
Sincerely,
[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/56623803:sl1SFGKrN:m:1:1155937413:DBAB59B06C95C591E3AE9514417298BA:r "Josh Hawley")
Josh Hawley

subject: Defend, not defund
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Perdue for Senate
body:
My opponent wants to defund the police.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mCLnUeu2gXlupLpWMLv4ci1gnZCuVdYLVC7uGv903ke-u7Bb8yVqgXy71PJjCnypGkaCKLV-2jJhLpbrt0vmMpbSVR4QfiMWdE83syVMxZj7H_14d8weS-JoSqfv_JKlzSRKMake4-Z73ojI3BJhjwk9ZAFgB3stMe6zhoDBNGfyzHH2R9e07kQgDlsOsP9c&c=NeVQ0S02rbnr8zKuEI2qN2GhvhUsBQ6xFNbXLeZSvxPI_zRzZOdTVg==&ch=CaUBeiwCSQjFJEnzjpKHAek-4uIoSJIyXjMVtbHCeIs8eWKt-mtUvg==)

Friend,

This election is crucial for the safety and security of Georgia and our great nation.

Here's what's at stake: Radical Democrats like Chuck Schumer, Stacey Abrams, and our Leftist defund-the-police opponent, Jon Ossoff, are hell-bent on abolishing your law enforcement while taking away your Second Amendment right to defend yourself.

_**With mere days before November 3rd, time is running out to protect the fundamental right to safety and security in our communities. **_

We have the opportunity to keep a trusted voice for Georgia in the U.S. Senate to fight back and defend our American cities and sisters and brothers in blue. Friend, the reality is, we need your support now more than ever.

[**DONATE ANY AMOUNT TO BACK THE BLUE -> **](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mCLnUeu2gXlupLpWMLv4ci1gnZCuVdYLVC7uGv903ke-u7Bb8yVqgXy71PJjCnypGkaCKLV-2jJhLpbrt0vmMpbSVR4QfiMWdE83syVMxZj7H_14d8weS-JoSqfv_JKlzSRKMake4-Z73ojI3BJhjwk9ZAFgB3stMe6zhoDBNGfyzHH2R9e07kQgDlsOsP9c&c=NeVQ0S02rbnr8zKuEI2qN2GhvhUsBQ6xFNbXLeZSvxPI_zRzZOdTVg==&ch=CaUBeiwCSQjFJEnzjpKHAek-4uIoSJIyXjMVtbHCeIs8eWKt-mtUvg==)
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mCLnUeu2gXlupLpWMLv4ci1gnZCuVdYLVC7uGv903ke-u7Bb8yVqgXy71PJjCnypGkaCKLV-2jJhLpbrt0vmMpbSVR4QfiMWdE83syVMxZj7H_14d8weS-JoSqfv_JKlzSRKMake4-Z73ojI3BJhjwk9ZAFgB3stMe6zhoDBNGfyzHH2R9e07kQgDlsOsP9c&c=NeVQ0S02rbnr8zKuEI2qN2GhvhUsBQ6xFNbXLeZSvxPI_zRzZOdTVg==&ch=CaUBeiwCSQjFJEnzjpKHAek-4uIoSJIyXjMVtbHCeIs8eWKt-mtUvg==)

We can save our country from going down this dangerous road of anarchy. The radical Left is attempting to infiltrate Georgia and transform it into the next nightmare state of California. It is VITAL that we do not allow the democrats to destroy our cities, lives, and futures. This election will determine whether we will stand strong for our excellent law enforcement and save our beautiful country or let the Left's dangerous agenda win.

Commit your support today to let law enforcement and David know you're standing with them.

[**DEFEND, NOT DEFUND >>> **](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mCLnUeu2gXlupLpWMLv4ci1gnZCuVdYLVC7uGv903ke-u7Bb8yVqgXy71PJjCnypGkaCKLV-2jJhLpbrt0vmMpbSVR4QfiMWdE83syVMxZj7H_14d8weS-JoSqfv_JKlzSRKMake4-Z73ojI3BJhjwk9ZAFgB3stMe6zhoDBNGfyzHH2R9e07kQgDlsOsP9c&c=NeVQ0S02rbnr8zKuEI2qN2GhvhUsBQ6xFNbXLeZSvxPI_zRzZOdTVg==&ch=CaUBeiwCSQjFJEnzjpKHAek-4uIoSJIyXjMVtbHCeIs8eWKt-mtUvg==)
Thank you for supporting us in this fight,

Team Perdue

name: Doug Collins
subject: Joe Biden’s Court Packing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COLLINS
body:
Joe Biden's Court Packing

Peter,
Have you been watching the
Supreme Court confirmation hearings? The Left is up to their same
old tricks.
But these hearings prove what we
already knew, Amy Coney Barrett is a highly qualified and
distinguished jurist who would make an excellent Supreme Court
Justice. The U.S. Constitution gives Donald Trump the power to
nominate a judge who will defend the Constitution, and the Senate
must confirm Amy Coney Barrett NOW.
Democrats know the American
people don't support their policies, so the liberals in
Washington are already openly talking about packing the courts.
They want to throw the Constitution out the window. In fact,
they'll do anything they can to implement their radical ideas.
We can't let that happen. I need
your help to get to the U.S. Senate and shut down the liberal
playbook.
Will you take a stand with me in
the fight against the extreme Left's radical agenda and help me
raise $85,321 in the next 24 hours so I can continue to fight for
freedom in the U.S. Senate?
My name is Doug Collins, I am a
conservative Congressman from Georgia, a Lieutenant Colonel, and
a Chaplain in the Air Force Reserve. I was also a part of
President Trump's defense team during the sham impeachment trial
in the Senate.
Democrats are constantly looking
for ways to change the rules to favor their agenda. When they
lost in 2016, they sought to impeach the President.
Now just weeks before the 2020
Election, with the prospects of losing again, Nancy Pelosi wants
to enact the 25th Amendment to remove President Trump from the
Oval Office. How absurd!
To stop them in their tracks,
America will need a conservative fighter like me to stand up to
liberals who will attempt to pack the courts with radical
progressives-a promise Kamala Harris made to her supporters when
she announced her 2019 campaign for President.
Working with the President, I
have already done so much to fight for the American people, but
my work isn't done and that's why I'm asking for your support in
my race for the U.S. Senate. If everyone reading this email
donates just $45, we would have everything we need to win and
defeat those who want to stop a conservative from winning a U.S.
Senate seat.

CONTRIBUTE $35

CONTRIBUTE $50

CONTRIBUTE $100

CONTRIBUTE $250

CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT

If you send me to the Senate,
I'll be able to continue the battle against the left, and expose
Chuck Schumer, Bernie Sanders, and Elizabeth Warren, but first, I
need your help to get there.
Can I count on your support?
God Bless YOU, and God Bless the
United States of America,

Doug Collins
Member of Congress (R-GA)
Republican for Senate

PAID FOR BY COLLINS
FOR SENATE, INC.

Please take a minute to read the special
message from our sponsor. Sponsorships like this one help us keep
our news service free of charge.
The sponsorship above reflects the opinions &
representations of the advertiser, & not necessarily the opinion
of USA Freedom Fighters.

name: John Cornyn
subject: BREAKING NEWS: It’s begun
body:
Friend, I've always promised to let my closest supporters know about important news that could affect the state of this race, first, when the time came.
Well, the news is here and that time is now: The Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC) is officially spending millions right here in Texas to prop up my radical opponent, Hollywood Hegar, who is already being bankrolled by coastal elites.
Friend, this is no ordinary spend. This is a SEVEN FIGURE BUY that could single-handedly change this race.
Every dollar injected into MJ's campaign from California and Texas will be used to build her name-ID in Texas, which will then boost her polling, help spread her false messaging, and attempt to sway undecided voters.
**[My team and I have made the critical decision to re-open our EMERGENCY RESPONSE FUND, and we are counting on you to answer our call to fight back IMMEDIATELY.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VxstNYuH3mvRxH_dAs1Ko5BByE_crTvbazsSQTBBIBfaZ2B-hjE5abB_bnp9Dq8RXyMf8Y6qf53NBS1gfl4-J71roMeC_cOIpg0IxmBOa1Hn1ezpz1UnCdPDf-jlF_T0t_Xi9n74uUoTS2gf7p8CKfjRw3z8StIz4MvavSwY3ZLsgxttggTU7roY1jG2SvaxunBnBG4fDMbgpYrehmFNkzb_u9r-0HsbgSFxHE6Q87cigdxmvo5dHu51-FMfiDCkqxfyRgkmsyUIljLOHmFumFsMhixBkOmKXdgcEgN41LLSPqPNk7CwqaPKbcugGUtF7f655L7IEQ0ld2Wfb9QDtQah3HV6dFoPxC25P4qyfCK_71RvqIxEOQ==&c=sxixOzmbuaDgSejflNGMEgxkj1B1nWYAn2PvUK7z6dD5CM7NagJpqg==&ch=Wh7ZrBxNtC8LXX4zbWQzdnKiOX-oc8wC10Lzc_xhPyW5Nt9vS5MC4A==)** **EMERGENCY RESPONSE FUND** Double Match: **ACTIVATED** [**KEEP TEXAS RED**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VxstNYuH3mvRxH_dAs1Ko5BByE_crTvbazsSQTBBIBfaZ2B-hjE5abB_bnp9Dq8RXyMf8Y6qf53NBS1gfl4-J71roMeC_cOIpg0IxmBOa1Hn1ezpz1UnCdPDf-jlF_T0t_Xi9n74uUoTS2gf7p8CKfjRw3z8StIz4MvavSwY3ZLsgxttggTU7roY1jG2SvaxunBnBG4fDMbgpYrehmFNkzb_u9r-0HsbgSFxHE6Q87cigdxmvo5dHu51-FMfiDCkqxfyRgkmsyUIljLOHmFumFsMhixBkOmKXdgcEgN41LLSPqPNk7CwqaPKbcugGUtF7f655L7IEQ0ld2Wfb9QDtQah3HV6dFoPxC25P4qyfCLCY-RF9BPeWg==&c=sxixOzmbuaDgSejflNGMEgxkj1B1nWYAn2PvUK7z6dD5CM7NagJpqg==&ch=Wh7ZrBxNtC8LXX4zbWQzdnKiOX-oc8wC10Lzc_xhPyW5Nt9vS5MC4A==) Chuck Schumer's plan is playing out just as he intended.
First? He gets his chosen candidate, MJ Hegar.
Then, he sees that the Cook Political Report has downgraded our race's status from Likely R to Lean R.
And finally, Friend, he DUMPS millions right here into Texas to hopefully take his radical New York values and impart them into our conservative and RED Lone Star State.
We need to respond quickly. We have less than 20 days left in this race, and we've never faced a threat so large.
**[I need to know that I can count on you to immediately chip in $50 now to counterback on every single one of these attacks.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VxstNYuH3mvRxH_dAs1Ko5BByE_crTvbazsSQTBBIBfaZ2B-hjE5abB_bnp9Dq8R3PcKTCLpFiCSdj3eYDdLoRDNLWnMtQnXN5ebv1LBvxh7KNZ--WEv2Q2pSsrmFEJ4XeHfr57PDRzH4BhpukT2NQn0_-qshopILz4YBy7lJYyZsQqXIlV_iMs1zCq3ualhegch48Me4jY5srRs5hZKjcrqbJ9bc_5e3X9CwaLfh0CNfeBGRAjfA-ZBxEh2UcVycOJnCA1I1T1jvMuTeN1TeAR3qTuOjk3gxe1ziTJtvifUw_pEariWDXnHDL8twWKbDFeoZ4dS8ADN_lBcw7G6wOZv1b5CB7dWB5UJ4WIfkq_9s6MTy8-_gp3vXqYJvi7U1Qe2iXyXl_M=&c=sxixOzmbuaDgSejflNGMEgxkj1B1nWYAn2PvUK7z6dD5CM7NagJpqg==&ch=Wh7ZrBxNtC8LXX4zbWQzdnKiOX-oc8wC10Lzc_xhPyW5Nt9vS5MC4A==) **
Friend, let me reemphasize: This is huge. This news is not something to be passive about.
We must answer back immediately if we want to stand any chance of coming out victorious on November 3rd.
As Texans, we are resilient, and to the end, we'll ensure that our values hold strong. This is our chance. This is our time.
\-- John Cornyn Paid for by the Cornyn Majority Texas, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc., Alamo PAC, and the Republican Party of Texas. Cornyn Majority Texas
228 South Washington Street, Suite 115, Alexandria, VA 22314 CORNYN MAJORITY TEXAS DISCLAIMER

The CORNYN MAJORITY TEXAS (JFC) is a joint fundraising committee composed of: Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc., Alamo PAC, Republican Party of Texas, and NRSC (each individually, a Committee and collectively, the Committees). Contributions or gifts to JFC, or any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

All contributions permissible under FECA, but which would cause a contributor to exceed any applicable Federal contribution limit to a specific Committee, shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contribution that would otherwise cause a contributor to exceed any applicable Federal contribution limit or that is otherwise impermissible under FECA shall be refunded to the contributor. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participating Committee, to the extent permissible by FECA. Any contributor may make his or her contribution directly payable to any Committee participating in JFC. Any such designated contribution that causes the contributor to exceed the contribution limit to the designated Committee shall not be reallocated by JFC absent the prior written permission of the contributor as required by law.

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without green cards), federal government contractors, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. No contributions to the NRSC Headquarters Account or the NRSC Legal Fund will be used to influence any federal election.

The maximum an individual or a federal non-multicandidate political committee may contribute to JFC is $266,300. The maximum amount a federal multi-candidate political action committee may contribute to JFC is $120,000. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.

Contributions to JFC shall be allocated as follows:

1. The first $2,800 from any single individuals contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $35,500 shall go to the NRSC. The next $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds up to $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
2. The first $5,600 from any joint individual contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $20,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $10,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $71,000 shall go to the NRSC. The next $213,000 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds from a joint individual contribution up to $213,000 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
3. The first $2,800 from any federal non-multicandidate PAC shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $35,500 shall go to the NRSC. The next $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds up to $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
4. The first $5,000 from any federal multicandidate PAC contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $5,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to the Alamo PAC. The next $15,000 shall go to the NRSC. The next $45,000 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds from a federal multicandidate PAC contribution up to $45,000 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.

The contributors signature shall serve as written designation of his or her contribution to the particular elections described above. With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VxstNYuH3mvRxH_dAs1Ko5BByE_crTvbazsSQTBBIBfaZ2B-hjE5abzjqIDcPLnhbh-PmhCZfOLNYn8GCRmENVzU589qUO0emAQJljNJkab-35S-NkAnR4SfCQsHxQu47IeefnzhJy3D_917MEE2GkAwCbs7vkxarNGa67yuR4Q=&c=sxixOzmbuaDgSejflNGMEgxkj1B1nWYAn2PvUK7z6dD5CM7NagJpqg==&ch=Wh7ZrBxNtC8LXX4zbWQzdnKiOX-oc8wC10Lzc_xhPyW5Nt9vS5MC4A==) and [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VxstNYuH3mvRxH_dAs1Ko5BByE_crTvbazsSQTBBIBfaZ2B-hjE5aYlsGHUaVmbynzVwCliMCiKyTJZrKZmRua3o5ObYWef48sqJAzj_46_5P77DEyOxXxtGoTU8wr5Ln3l3WiIW5stx40OvRykvT3PQcsqb5ZQN&c=sxixOzmbuaDgSejflNGMEgxkj1B1nWYAn2PvUK7z6dD5CM7NagJpqg==&ch=Wh7ZrBxNtC8LXX4zbWQzdnKiOX-oc8wC10Lzc_xhPyW5Nt9vS5MC4A==) that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VxstNYuH3mvRxH_dAs1Ko5BByE_crTvbazsSQTBBIBfaZ2B-hjE5abzjqIDcPLnhz4pkA1m_T_2JXHxDJtyLaVvXd6HtvUtfetkyUdxQjOpN0lpLuskGSN_Fk6hf8qcaQeRbGZsKY8XNC3NiJT21T0h2VfvSZtB2FacdGc3GQdUqnVWiGMmFgg==&c=sxixOzmbuaDgSejflNGMEgxkj1B1nWYAn2PvUK7z6dD5CM7NagJpqg==&ch=Wh7ZrBxNtC8LXX4zbWQzdnKiOX-oc8wC10Lzc_xhPyW5Nt9vS5MC4A==) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VxstNYuH3mvRxH_dAs1Ko5BByE_crTvbazsSQTBBIBfaZ2B-hjE5aZLwc4XZp14uEt1igMtzsHeV9LBWZxo3a2Hd9UaSSCSbILo97z_K3JoKzi0KIrgVDjdYOWuCjyjabbE4gejXgVtgEfOdYmVSwVI_NK6r7WpRO5Er_GS6ct_0FO_j6Iotjx6AsOnWzmUm2s2cWOYRlcIk2XUYE8kq6tc_g8S1OuiU-16chvzfFcaLsFj_AFi3HKoKpTSsRTrba_6uCZG4ovTQOFzoz1OMrqXEY9AyxbsZt-vlun5LPg2WO94S-z_xEg==&c=sxixOzmbuaDgSejflNGMEgxkj1B1nWYAn2PvUK7z6dD5CM7NagJpqg==&ch=Wh7ZrBxNtC8LXX4zbWQzdnKiOX-oc8wC10Lzc_xhPyW5Nt9vS5MC4A==) and find out exactly how you can help. We'd be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate.Together, we can protect this great state we know and love, and promote a safe, prosperous, and healthy Texas. Contributions to Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc. are not tax-deductible.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: Why we march
body:
Over the weekend, I joined local leaders and organizers in Morris for a Women’s March. We march because the fight for gender equality is not over. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/367810d6987d/why-we-march?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Over the weekend, I joined local leaders and organizers in Morris for a Women’s March.

We march because the fight for gender equality is not over. Women still only make $0.81 for every dollar a man makes (and it’s even less for women of color). We are under threat of rampant harassment in the workplace. And our reproductive rights are under siege yet again.

**I am running to unseat one of the House’s most anti-woman members.** He has supported restricting access to abortions for rape survivors, voted against the Paycheck Fairness Act, called for the complete overturn of Roe v. Wade, and opposes the Equal Rights Amendment. He likes to call himself the lone rational member of Congress, _but in reality he has a radically anti-woman agenda. _

People from all over recognize the dire need to kick this guy out of the House. That is why I have been endorsed by Planned Parenthood - the first time they have ever endorsed in this district! - NARAL, the National Organization for Women, and Gloria Steinem herself. They all agree that I will do a lot better by women than my opponent has for the last decade he’s spent in Washington.

If we flip this district, all of Northern Illinois will be represented by pro-choice members of Congress. But we can only do that if you chip in to our campaign. [So can I count on you to donate to our race and unseat an anti-woman Congressman?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=92c27376fc&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

clean_body: Over the weekend, I joined local leaders and organizers in Morris for a Women’s March. We march because the fight for gender equality is not over. | | | | | | | Over the weekend, I joined local leaders and organizers in Morris for a Women’s March. We march because the fight for gender equality is not over. Women still only make $0.81 for every dollar a man makes (and it’s even less for women of color). We are under threat of rampant harassment in the workplace. And our reproductive rights are under siege yet again. I am running to unseat one of the House’s most anti-woman members. He has supported restricting access to abortions for rape survivors, voted against the Paycheck Fairness Act, called for the complete overturn of Roe v. Wade, and opposes the Equal Rights Amendment. He likes to call himself the lone rational member of Congress, but in reality he has a radically anti-woman agenda. People from all over recognize the dire need to kick this guy out of the House. That is why I have been endorsed by Planned Parenthood - the first time they have ever endorsed in this district! - NARAL, the National Organization for Women, and Gloria Steinem herself. They all agree that I will do a lot better by women than my opponent has for the last decade he’s spent in Washington. If we flip this district, all of Northern Illinois will be represented by pro-choice members of Congress. But we can only do that if you chip in to our campaign. Dani Brzozowski Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16 | "Help us unseat an anti-woman Congressman" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Dani for Illinois, All rights reserved.

subject: Someone I'd like you to meet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
We need him in Congress.

Friend, this is Mike Huckabee. I'm reaching out to you to tell you about how the future of our country is in danger, and how you can help us fix it. Our religious liberties are under siege from the Socialist Left, and **we HAVE to do our part to elect conservative leaders who will protect us against their continued attacks.** The Democrat Party is openly campaigning for late-term abortion, amnesty for illegal immigrants, open borders, and defunding the police. **They 're so confident in their liberal agenda, that they believe they can even implement it in conservative states like Texas! ** It's more important than ever that we have good, faith-driven leaders who stand up to the Radical Left in Washington. **That 's why we NEED to elect Ronny Jackson to represent Texas' 13th Congressional District. ** I've known Ronny Jackson for a quite a while, and he's a man who really embodies both his faith and his traditional family values. Ronny has served our country as a retired Rear Admiral in the United States Navy. Ronny and his wife Jane have raised a beautiful family and they truly embody everything it means to be patriotic Americans. body:
The Left’s plan of targeting red states is working, and we need your help. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1158243b1bae4128ac030067d97a1541&_e=MooIgWnYfiy64EdUn7naeoVrKW5BMQbpCPUZCM3uglijEQ10ALM0bbQhXc_mfos3nD1V2GlgEl-cmtwz3S0j2n1syNMwai27dq2aTCSUAGH8U-cV_HFCMjyyWkS2VLuzooN6bM6G-nvJ1SIYsMiylv2ufZSVh3MmxpzNEnaR9d4bMnQRqOkO0YSKjLbz4HvmZhsthdJwzsqNgT4-_MGoDf5vH5pd1-s8NnPzunYu-0d-n19td_Gepy3yunQb96KGYjUzR0o_xwAt1h9EOiFmH0wocSl0FKVLVjDtTb072vAf-6F9jj6O-GaiTALAfHBm8LIfeSVGke-GrqD8MZHOc-b7TcVpX5xd_Nk43q7FxWX6aOgm1p9BH3hz73ZaoDfmw_wmRV6q6C6x4wRvI9ZBcwr4UH1pMcpcsie20zP7OJY%3D)

Hey Peter,

I’m going to cut right to the chase.

We’re 55 donations short of my goal to help protect the Republican Senate majority. **[Can you step up and donate before midnight to help us fight off the Left?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1158243b1bae4128ac030067d97a1541&_e=MooIgWnYfiy64EdUn7naeoVrKW5BMQbpCPUZCM3uglijEQ10ALM0bbQhXc_mfos3nD1V2GlgEl-cmtwz3S0j2n1syNMwai27dq2aTCSUAGH8U-cV_HFCMjyyWkS2VLuzooN6bM6G-nvJ1SIYsMiylv2ufZSVh3MmxpzNEnaR9d4bMnQRqOkO0YSKjLbz4HvmZhsthdJwzsqNgT4-_MGoDStO2rvD9rfbkhxvbcnE7SpRvP0ObVhnwWoGxQTfpnu6AkxL1wy1gIELFaAMjaC36Vbl_2d6nYU_jb0L_q5ONNoySq0fYq83-8FNwZr2ANAbbndPDvzEXIwrrEm5dbZo2-OliQQptexFkot7KPvx9leavMpr4E-oTPvLu4DniMNgCOPij2vQqixqDtDTgz9oL7Qqi9kvGDtZduwriTWmuu4%3D)**

President Obama and Chuck Schumer are raising and spending tens of millions of dollars to flip the Senate this cycle, and one of their top targets is my good friend Senator Steve Daines from Montana.

It’s vital we do everything we can from now until Election Day to help conservatives like Steve. **[We need your help to hold the U.S. Senate majority.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1158243b1bae4128ac030067d97a1541&_e=MooIgWnYfiy64EdUn7naeoVrKW5BMQbpCPUZCM3uglijEQ10ALM0bbQhXc_mfos3nD1V2GlgEl-cmtwz3S0j2n1syNMwai27dq2aTCSUAGH8U-cV_HFCMjyyWkS2VLuzooN6bM6G-nvJ1SIYsMiylv2ufZSVh3MmxpzNEnaR9d4bMnQRqOkO0YSKjLbz4HvmZhsthdJwzsqNgT4-_MGoDa6fwCQpLstMBTcebfr_tL3mEIhxBXD87G_p3WBb-wzXw5Qib3g2k9mnEPmK7ThYgy1rQ0rBqUEYjJR2hV6dBLz6Dpsa3rldHcaTPxSNzK81VCKWN1rOzyV29cn3tzkHC94YTTwh0L03_EfDx02T3IyekLE8Uu9l45JlCCp7PtbypqOBwf6baPnk7aVjuBugdT9Rm4hhy7cqyGfcGyP-O7w%3D)**

| [**HELP US PROTECT THE SENATE MAJORITY ->**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1158243b1bae4128ac030067d97a1541&_e=MooIgWnYfiy64EdUn7naeoVrKW5BMQbpCPUZCM3uglijEQ10ALM0bbQhXc_mfos3nD1V2GlgEl-cmtwz3S0j2n1syNMwai27dq2aTCSUAGH8U-cV_HFCMjyyWkS2VLuzooN6bM6G-nvJ1SIYsMiylv2ufZSVh3MmxpzNEnaR9d4bMnQRqOkO0YSKjLbz4HvmZhsthdJwzsqNgT4-_MGoDSVJn9ZlNdCHM-pTqnNOQ0N1oUTJmmxrMdkZczkhgpTJ4t9mpPuCbNBDMXBBGTY6JLU_mTv2rS8A4xz4At5PeGtf0exM0X0XJojrZRt6tiLNmo2r-nrso1-iIwN5a_GXXXcNX1LQpn-LjoP5d0wlju9nSvuwgZpRMNZ6uYLoNQ7yaeo3cwU8OCRpLSV-5jEH3FqEdSzbYOgjPvbC2LFDwhU%3D)
---

Obama and Schumer know they only need to flip four seats to win the majority. Normally I wouldn’t be too concerned, but Steve and I have been consistently outraised this year by our liberal Democrat opponents.

The Left’s plan of targeting red states is working, and we need your help.

**[Please, do anything you can right now to support both of our critical re-elections. Without Steve, the Republican Senate majority is lost.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1158243b1bae4128ac030067d97a1541&_e=MooIgWnYfiy64EdUn7naeoVrKW5BMQbpCPUZCM3uglijEQ10ALM0bbQhXc_mfos3nD1V2GlgEl-cmtwz3S0j2n1syNMwai27dq2aTCSUAGH8U-cV_HFCMjyyWkS2VLuzooN6bM6G-nvJ1SIYsMiylv2ufZSVh3MmxpzNEnaR9d4bMnQRqOkO0YSKjLbz4HvmZhsthdJwzsqNgT4-_MGoDeekoJlkb3dTaOXzzsKfp1OnNYCenhB6fBWJVOxXOrUQHNj3phRSUBYufDi91367X7QYoL9tmpLgPWpiBlfTUWZ3_xTR2Sa245g2uygfuh-IHIJHuN7yYVRn9U_SBeyZAmopGP9Gpxs_xAdVB_j5wv105A7d8Ue3Bji0LKU1y4THC8V_fFa_prfT93994yB_cRPtNam-dfZdNrKjpgnTmO4%3D)**

[**STAND WITH STEVE DAINES AND LINDSEY GRAHAM ->**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1158243b1bae4128ac030067d97a1541&_e=MooIgWnYfiy64EdUn7naeoVrKW5BMQbpCPUZCM3uglijEQ10ALM0bbQhXc_mfos3nD1V2GlgEl-cmtwz3S0j2n1syNMwai27dq2aTCSUAGH8U-cV_HFCMjyyWkS2VLuzooN6bM6G-nvJ1SIYsMiylv2ufZSVh3MmxpzNEnaR9d4bMnQRqOkO0YSKjLbz4HvmZhsthdJwzsqNgT4-_MGoDfKmJGFUepEZwZgKCJiYfUx8eSMOwwyQeWr7lDJ4VhjztoQjDCNosgnSqwmYUMHHbrKOThyOxqtcJf0ZAOOwULckPhjHM7vWVp56KB-FlKAQcYht41bQmIiSuwMn50tZcVPqIKo5vqgnkIgftzxBnfmnSPBC8Vcc9ESkk7Dpz-q9AGPnTESFy7Q-9ySgPI1X1-SWmEaH3pGq_0fGkirh7Cw%3D)
---

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

P.S. **[The donation you make today will be split to help Steve Daines in Montana and my campaign in South Carolina.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1158243b1bae4128ac030067d97a1541&_e=MooIgWnYfiy64EdUn7naeoVrKW5BMQbpCPUZCM3uglijEQ10ALM0bbQhXc_mfos3nD1V2GlgEl-cmtwz3S0j2n1syNMwai27dq2aTCSUAGH8U-cV_HFCMjyyWkS2VLuzooN6bM6G-nvJ1SIYsMiylv2ufZSVh3MmxpzNEnaR9d4bMnQRqOkO0YSKjLbz4HvmZhsthdJwzsqNgT4-_MGoDTEXex--qc-ABMl0ZWAdXXg-kKFmDPjw3Z8rloe42FkD-nONSwWUu29dhyqhDqQgq4xiNG1FuwWLz47t48qwf7W68FpYE9O16v7Qo8IRyFh8bW-IOlJbr4Ojd8hpPVYXCHtGXfMBE-KC8hFfWh0MtThvacJ37w4gm0RxdgH-OuFKVr7KSGbOl3rzk1TZ5arZjQDURSunn6D864FleItIVFo%3D)** Both of our races are critical to keeping our GOP Senate majority, so thank you for stepping up to help.

_Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track.[Chip in $10 or more to help Steve today!](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1158243b1bae4128ac030067d97a1541&_e=MooIgWnYfiy64EdUn7naeoVrKW5BMQbpCPUZCM3uglijEQ10ALM0bbQhXc_mfos3nD1V2GlgEl-cmtwz3S0j2n1syNMwai27dq2aTCSUAGH8U-cV_HFCMjyyWkS2VLuzooN6bM6G-nvJ1SIYsMiylv2ufZSVh3MmxpzNEnaR9d4bMnQRqOkO0YSKjLbz4HvmZhsthdJwzsqNgT4-_MGoDX0hAuku7lcCouxAdP0iEIRJ_SH17IR0xt8SmgRDDzoswyb2zZDXOfXOYx2BcmudFc662ec4FAEOUdvqJiEDnAS4TMppmbATw80PdO9mnYhC6uSHZ8IF1Y5Nr-Nfky1Kuk2ctoMH65PR1go9tGRr5P0IKv3YuqBxACbFkD2Td3TVv-ppGAaZ-9XC_Smk_vEySOwfEr69Ckxu34kG1SsC3u4%3D)

name: Senate GOP via Team Todd
subject: 15 days to determine our future
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TODD YOUNG, INC
body:
To be frank, we are running out of time.
Friend, to be frank, we are running out of time.

Democrats are putting up unbelievable numbers across the country, and our Senate Majority is in more danger now than ever before. With just over two weeks until election day, we have to double our efforts to ensure we can withstand these attacks from the radical Left.

With just over two weeks until election day, we have to double our efforts to ensure we can withstand these attacks from the radical Left. As a top conservative supporter, we know you care about our great nation and the representatives we elect to lead it. body:
Friend, I wanted to make sure you heard directly from me how important it is to get Nicole in Congress because she is a warrior.
| | | | From the Desk of
President Donald J. Trump
---
| | |
---
| | **Friend,

** Last week I did a live call with Nicole Malliotakis, and in case you missed that call I wanted to make sure you heard directly from me how important it is to get Nicole in Congress because she is a warrior.

---
| | |
---
| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=354A541A1A7356)
---
| | |
---
| | [ HELP NICOLE WIN → ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=354A541A1A7357)
---
| | |
---
| | It is so important to me to take the time out to get Nicole into office. She'll be an incredible Congressperson. She will be fighting for our police, our safety, our jobs, our borders, and our God-given rights guaranteed by the Constitution, and with your help we’ll have Nicole in Congress.

I am all for Nicole, and I give her a 1,000% endorsement. [Will you join me in supporting Nicole with a $50, $100, or even $250 donation to her campaign immediately?](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=354A541A1A7358)

---

---
| | |
---
| | Nicole’s opponent, liberal Max Rose, is a de Blasio person. How can we elect anybody who supports de Blasio? Her opponent Max Rose is a disaster. He's a puppet for Nancy Pelosi, he's in lockstep with Nancy Pelosi 97% of the time, he votes with the Socialist Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and he voted to impeach your president, twice. He is a disgrace.

We need every patriot in New York’s 11th Congressional District to get out and vote for Nicole Malliotakis for Congress. She's incredible.

---

We are the only organization solely focused on electing Republicans to down-ballot, state-level offices. name: Dan Sullivan
subject: We're almost out of time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alaskans for Dan Sullivan
body:
Friend,

October is nearly over and we are far short from where we need to be.

The Radical Left and Anti-Conservatives are working overtime to "flip Alaska Blue". We can't let that happen.

body:
There is no sugarcoating it. The Republican Senate Majority is in serious jeopardy. In my home state of South Carolina, the Democrat raised a record-breaking $57 million last quarter to beat Lindsey Graham.
Friend,

There is no sugarcoating it. The Republican Senate Majority is in serious jeopardy.

In my home state of South Carolina, the Democrat raised a record-breaking $57 million last quarter to beat Lindsey Graham.

**Let that number sink in. $57 million.**

We are down to the FINAL DAYS of the 2020 election and I know we've been asking a lot lately, but the Senate Majority is at stake.

[**I am hoping you will double down and help save the Senate Majority by chipping in $5, $10, $25 or even $50.**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/57-million/?utm_campaign=20201019_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1036156-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201019_first-name-57-million-reasons-to-open-this-email)

Losing the Republican Majority means that all of our conservative victories, from tax cuts to opportunity zones, will be reversed.

There is so much on the line this November. We need to make sure we turn out every conservative across the country to vote.

Democrats have a seemingly endless pile of cash they are using to flood the airwaves in battleground states--we need the resources to fight back.

[**Please, Friend, double down and help save the Senate Majority by chipping in $5, $10, $25 or even $50.**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/57-million/?utm_campaign=20201019_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1036156-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201019_first-name-57-million-reasons-to-open-this-email)

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Do you know where to vote?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
Increasing turnout is also a key step in our path to victory. So, at Team Kennedy we’re doing everything we can to make sure Texans have the right information to cast their ballot safely and on time.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20508642/257266129/-1907457921?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201019pollingplace_TK_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTk4ZjRmNC0zNDEyLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lk8KMzudYSceNWshQpqNOmigz3TOjMEweUQah1BRIJs=)
---
Yesterday, we sent an email about the massive, record-setting turnout right here in Texas. But Texas Republicans are making it as hard as possible to vote because they know that when Texans in record numbers vote democracy wins. Increasing turnout is also a key step in our path to victory. So, at Team Kennedy we’re doing everything we can to make sure Texans have the right information to cast their ballot safely and on time. That’s why we’re asking everyone we know one question: **Do you know where to vote?** [_**If not, you can click right here to find your polling place!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20508644/257266241/401752117?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTk4ZjRmNC0zNDEyLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lk8KMzudYSceNWshQpqNOmigz3TOjMEweUQah1BRIJs=&emci=c6728653-0f12-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=ea98f4f4-3412-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=10438639) | | **[ Find your polling place](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20508646/257266243/401752117?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTk4ZjRmNC0zNDEyLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lk8KMzudYSceNWshQpqNOmigz3TOjMEweUQah1BRIJs=&emci=c6728653-0f12-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=ea98f4f4-3412-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=10438639)**

**And when you're done, help our team get out the vote by[ _chipping in $15 to our GOTV program_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20508648/257266245/-1907457921?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201019pollingplace_TK_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTk4ZjRmNC0zNDEyLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lk8KMzudYSceNWshQpqNOmigz3TOjMEweUQah1BRIJs=) and forwarding this email to a few other folks who might need to know where they can vote.**

Team Kennedy
