name: Hershel Walker
subject: Georgia's game plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Perdue for Senate
body:
The dems are convinced that if they can win Georgia - they can win anywhere.

Friend,

The Democrats are determined to reverse President Trump's America-First agenda and turn our great nation BLUE. They want to take down the President's teammates, and they've set their sights on Senator David Perdue.

name: Clarke Tucker
subject: How I’m voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Clarke Tucker for State Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/lFISud3Cyzj7DJ5ljBySvOTYYW-XKmnn1rLt58PNoqU=/5F1cQTn8zJm6G3Bvrsy2xedzJdmtmq7MM9nEsOpATCc=)

Dear friend --

I've had this day circled on my calendar for a long time -- today is the **_first day_** to vote early in the 2020 election.

While the pandemic has disrupted much of how we live our daily lives, we can't let it keep us from casting our ballots in this year's election.

Usually I prefer to cast my ballot on Election Day, but this year is different. I will be voting early in person with my family this afternoon, and I encourage you to vote as soon as you can to ensure your voice is heard. You can vote by mail or in person, whichever you prefer. Just make sure you, your family, and your friends make a plan to vote, and do it soon!

If you have questions about when, where, and how to vote, **[visit my website here.](https://act.myngp.com/el/lFISud3Cyzj7DJ5ljBySvOTYYW-XKmnn1rLt58PNoqU=/bqpyhRKkuO8MbwksyB_-n5Q_UFyaCqjqTt-wxcDbrF8=)**

If you have time to give between now and November 3, whether to make phone calls, to do no-contact door-knocking, or to help with sign visibility during rush hour or on Election Day, [please complete the form on our website](https://act.myngp.com/el/lFISud3Cyzj7DJ5ljBySvOTYYW-XKmnn1rLt58PNoqU=/exF9fTO2ONci6CFn3rpKNQPoPwLacGWbar2jzrhDxxc=).

Thank you for being a part of this campaign. Together, we can win this race on November 3rd and work to give every Arkansan a fair shot at achieving their version of the American Dream.
Be safe, and talk soon.
Clarke

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/lFISud3Cyzj7DJ5ljBySvOTYYW-XKmnn1rLt58PNoqU=/5F1cQTn8zJm6G3Bvrsy2xedzJdmtmq7MM9nEsOpATCc=)

Paid for by Clarke Tucker for State Senate

I just wanted to check in with you on your voting plan, and give you a quick reminder about the absentee ballot deadline in South Carolina.
**If you are planning on voting absentee and haven’t already requested your ballot, please do so at the link below. All voters are now qualified to vote absentee. To vote by mail, applications must be received by the voter registration office by _5:00 p.m., Saturday, October 24._**
_**[REQUEST YOUR ABSENTEE BALLOT>>](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=771a8d31f2964a18b638ab30f39cf8ec&_e=yxyCGGUOrAUqbW8A6jg88h54cPS9iTBSRKtOBODAUuuUTtjgmp0vQNyVyXVdCrx7DEq0rZfZVMNyBO88L4jSUwh6YuwwKR_IzHYylZtfdlGYj1R0OV6dABL4JgVEOk9oU2eYVbfjInRqt9GUcHFLyNxIF3W6Ud4aDIO1GE7zRCfzOf2dfZywgH_amtVny6l6-3m9TAtkGEkhAvlmE-OPTk8qkYpG-9ebaUCbXaUUSXLq4x4eUlFzyV0Zb5ULj0U4LNaFc-Mz3ArMFoN7AGiNQcfXKJl9AneqLFm2gra-1PLyT-gH7GplJpUpqi3peM_9RWfZF2Cezw7hwdzkjPs-yLKUEuC2PCm1eS8D4ph5jWD7cJ4ilg4N2Y92q29qSK9iu-_p1RMpDoBduooRvSwk2f_IY9w93EMnWlagm-pP664DbxI0LPs_mViUyZeu2MubSoly-zn9LrMZyq6fg7GmRLdMlyN5_29DTp0VyiwQxg768RGffj03g8CpHWT-6Dkrjrtot7JyFxosGkOit-ptjOC5gqIV86hOAtSfOL0BopQ%3D)**_
_If you’ve already requested an absentee ballot, great! Don’t forget to fill it out and drop it in the mail to make your voice heard. _
We need every single person who believes in putting the Lowcountry first to cast a ballot for Nancy — there’s too much at stake to sit on the sidelines and our race is one of the closest races in the country.
_**[Voting in-person early or on Election Day? Find out where your polling place is. ](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=771a8d31f2964a18b638ab30f39cf8ec&_e=yxyCGGUOrAUqbW8A6jg88h54cPS9iTBSRKtOBODAUuuUTtjgmp0vQNyVyXVdCrx7DEq0rZfZVMNyBO88L4jSUwh6YuwwKR_IzHYylZtfdlE_5xxJbb3l21XC-t8GRk61Qfvrb1QZNwn2XSwU8GsG1Dcs_v6bqF0TymO6f0o1K36Bx-e6oqtqiN_fowKqJro-0LKx_I-Px3Lv-F1H_LEDQi_7VY_sXVju8nCKOI2O34LDkAExY9RY-ZYJG4WANiXf6-qhKz6azze-5rSVdHUfl4SslYzDCLnwhnd4IXY59BPnuyCH5WMZd5PgUKm8_Kl4xFrYcT8YtvfdKsmFv_ZmLhjzL4PjUcMS65HXFEAncFP7w1b27_Syc_24C7ieXaoibJDdZ7kn7GffjoB4AB9DZgdhXnZBjBo_T5FVIUoU2PB9x4lyj4MNYRPMFl3Ea7XdcphgZzYbFNMXjhSjOAbBqh_t9sIi5djiYRKhVihlXDNWT0jYyIwimcjSAIWBx2MSHAnRjuvKUV1JiUCktMIxkUkNbu70d7XU9IUtfqiB11w%3D)**_
**If you’ve already voted for Nancy, thank you so much — we can’t do this alone. clean_body: I just wanted to check in with you on your voting plan, and give you a quick reminder about the absentee ballot deadline in South Carolina. Hey Friend \- it’s Mara, Nancy Mace’s campaign manager. I just wanted to check in with you on your voting plan, and give you a quick reminder about the absentee ballot deadline in South Carolina. If you are planning on voting absentee and haven’t already requested your ballot, please do so at the link below. All voters are now qualified to vote absentee. To vote by mail, applications must be received by the voter registration office by 5:00 p.m., Saturday, October 24. If you’ve already requested an absentee ballot, great! Don’t forget to fill it out and drop it in the mail to make your voice heard. We need every single person who believes in putting the Lowcountry first to cast a ballot for Nancy — there’s too much at stake to sit on the sidelines and our race is one of the closest races in the country. If you’ve already voted for Nancy, thank you so much — we can’t do this alone. You can make an even bigger impact on our race by or We just can’t say it enough... THANK YOU for your support, Mara Mellstrom Campaign Manager Mace for Congress | | | | Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress | | 295 Seven Farms Drive C-186 Charleston, SC 29492 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

subject: Campaign update
body:
| | | |
---
| Friends,

With 15 days left until the election, we would like to give you an update on our campaign!
---
| [Donate Now](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=753066b620&e=16fac31a0f "Donate Now")
---
| Just in the last week, we completed our final debate, held a telerally with President Trump, earned the endorsement of the US Chamber of Commerce, and set a new quarterly fundraising record!
---
| [Donate $20](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=d1f865e819&e=16fac31a0f "Donate $20")
---
| We are building more and more momentum heading into the home stretch. [Will you help us keep this momentum going by donating $15 today](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=44da90bf40&e=16fac31a0f)? There are thousands of votes left to be cast, [even $5 could go a long way towards persuading undecided voters](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=9e816c9d35&e=16fac31a0f)!

Thank you for your support!

Austin Harris
Campaign Manager

clean_body: We achieved this because of YOU. | Friend, I want to thank you from the bottom of my heart for all of your support during this campaign. Thanks to patriots like you, we outraised my Democrat opponent Lizzie Fletcher by more than 2:1. But now, she’s hiding from her disastrous record of voting with Pelosi 99% of the time by refusing to debate me. Now that our race is STATISTICALLY TIED, we need to double down on our fundraising advantage to ensure we get our message out to voters as Fletcher hides from the public. My opponent is more concerned with winning favor from Pelosi than serving the people of Texas, Friend. That’s why she continues to hide from the people she claims to serve -- she knows real Texans would never stand for her anti-police, anti-small business, and anti-energy record. I’m determined to show voters the truth about her, but we need to keep fighting if we’re going to get our message out to every single voter in this critical Texas district. Our team is giving this final stretch everything we’ve got to keep our momentum going, but now that we’re tied, we need to push even harder. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Captain, U.S. Army Aviation Branch Official Republican Nominee for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch. Contributions are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Under federal law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $2800 for the primary election, $2,800 for the primary run-off election, and $2,800 for the general election. Couples may make contributions from a joint account, but each contributor must sign the check (or other written instrument) or a statement that accompanies the contribution. Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,800 for the primary election and $2,800 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.

body:
📺 Help ensure that First District voters see this ad.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/ac55cf5940075648/dbaa8400c66c5a7bc3d6b838967d376c/34143) Dear Peter, We’re hitting the airwaves with a new TV ad this week. As one of my top supporters, I wanted to make sure you’re among the first to see it. I’m letting voters know _exactly_ what’s wrong with Washington... and how we can fix it. Enough is enough of do-nothing “career” politicians. Most of them couldn't get hired to mop floors. It’s time for TERM LIMITS. It’s time to have more people with common sense representing the American people in Washington, NOT professional politicians who put their own interests first. [**Check out my new ad HERE**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/ac55cf5940075648/ed22d9a6ab4f7f72c3d6b838967d376c/34143), **[and chip in to help us get this ad in front of voters.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/ac55cf5940075648/291e33b53702e564c3d6b838967d376c/34143)** [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/ac55cf5940075648/d5a1feecda6f76a1c3d6b838967d376c/34143) America is a mess right now. We've all had enough of career politicians playing partisan games rather than working to get the job done to move our country forward. That why when the last government shutdown occurred, I donated my salary to veterans' groups. I wanted to send a message. Every lawmaker should have done the same. **These people always expect to get paid... even when they fail to get the job done.** **[Watch my new ad now, and please make a $5, $10, $25, or $50 contribution today](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/ac55cf5940075648/5271137649f1e85ac3d6b838967d376c/34143).** Let’s close strong and win big on November 3rd! -Kevin [**Donate NOW to Help Us Buy Airtime!**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/ac55cf5940075648/509edb8ea714fc5ac3d6b838967d376c/34143) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/ac55cf5940075648/56c166ca52eb2d3ec3d6b838967d376c/34143) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/ac55cf5940075648/17a431d1e48b02dac3d6b838967d376c/34143)

Friend,
---
I couldn't believe what I heard.
---
**At his recent town hall, Joe Biden promised to reverse a Trump executive order to ensure even "8-year-old" children would have full power to physically change their genders.**
---
_The morality of this nation is on the chopping block this November -- especially with polls showing that President Trump is 3 points behind in Florida._
---
_I would just hate to think that there was something more our coalition could have done to stop Biden and Kamala from winning Florida._
---
[**Please rush an urgent contribution to the Florida Faith and Freedom Coalition to help us SPEAK UP and defend our nation from the radical, immoral Left.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZYysU9lBj8MBU_I7Shi0p4LVQ3vpK8trJieAYPqO-lyUGqZMLuSykCDVu4_aMY2MR0b4dI_-c5Fc4pxQtv2HTTZf9Yn83JwgsbdTEkiIBzGxrJ_LuedocHuEGdzENFXSWwnD-HdHt_YKsHHvOnGyTC6QPGnffOyDzd-yJfMsAtZGHx0b6kloPeM3jnW3a9qP-JzLFLmEMQQeZpFBRwJpfwSMsdLL2rHXX_U3zhF9PNNzZPHP4AzQ2u1pePSlb-hqHEtRjnTKzlDGDD2c7RVILhlLIN3Qpb7ClJVfN1exrl8U6objPhjwzrSmqPPJSmEJ5mIMETifZpTf37vIxzNvYt2mhJO0w7DnANTvlWonGow=&c=S1hBj_wlzcjmRFouwydUIWq4cCsrrkj0l0DYychHQMXeQerRGqxQrg==&ch=2HUSKkAAGcRUXfojzhab3Ws2R-zgB6BLHPSi0Vm48QlhwErjYcjnBQ==)

**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZYysU9lBj8MBU_I7Shi0p4LVQ3vpK8trJieAYPqO-lyUGqZMLuSykCDVu4_aMY2MR0b4dI_-c5Fc4pxQtv2HTTZf9Yn83JwgsbdTEkiIBzGxrJ_LuedocHuEGdzENFXSWwnD-HdHt_YKsHHvOnGyTC6QPGnffOyDzd-yJfMsAtZGHx0b6kloPeM3jnW3a9qP-JzLFLmEMQQeZpFBRwJpfwSMsdLL2rHXX_U3zhF9PNNzZPHP4AzQ2u1pePSlb-hqHEtRjnTKzlDGDD2c7RVILhlLIN3Qpb7ClJVfN1exrl8U6objPhjwzrSmqPPJSmEJ5mIMETifZpTf37vIxzNvYt2mhJO0w7DnANTvlWonGow=&c=S1hBj_wlzcjmRFouwydUIWq4cCsrrkj0l0DYychHQMXeQerRGqxQrg==&ch=2HUSKkAAGcRUXfojzhab3Ws2R-zgB6BLHPSi0Vm48QlhwErjYcjnBQ==)**

We cannot allow Joe Biden to undo all the great work President Trump has done for this nation.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Commonsense gun violence prevention shouldn't be political.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
My opponent's rhetoric is dangerous.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8194%2E868730%2Et_6uTj) Friend, I want to share the facts about Initiative 1639, which expanded background checks, strengthened the rules for semi-automatic assault rifles, and created a safe storage incentive. Nearly 60% of Washingtonians voted for Initiative 1639 in 2018. The benefits were obvious. My opponent, Loren Culp, does not agree with facts -- or the majority of Washington voters. **It's important we share facts, not rhetoric, about gun safety. But first, I hope you'll stand with me in support of this evidence-based measure overwhelmingly passed by Washington state voters:[Add your name to join me in supporting Initiative 1639 and all commonsense gun violence prevention policies.](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/support-gun-violence-prevention-measures?utm_source=ema_2020-10-19_1639_&source=ema_2020-10-19_1639_&t=4&akid=8194%2E868730%2Et_6uTj)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/support-gun-violence-prevention-measures?utm_source=ema_2020-10-19_1639_&source=ema_2020-10-19_1639_&t=5&akid=8194%2E868730%2Et_6uTj)
---
I would have hoped that as a law enforcement official, Loren Culp would support policies that take meaningful action to keep our communities safe. Instead, here's what he really thinks on his own campaign website:
_The Washington State Constitution says, "The right of the individual citizen to bear arms in defense of himself or the state shall not be impaired". The Declaration of Independence declares that governments are instituted to protect citizen's rights._
_It is this principle that guided Loren's actions to say "No" to i1639. If we would have had police that stood by this principle to do what is right and protect citizen's rights, as Loren did, Rosa Parks would not have been taken to jail and millions of Jews would not have been sent to their deaths._
Here are some actual facts that Loren Culp and voters across the state should know:
We're seeing a dangerous increase in gun violence this year, as the stay-at-home orders enacted across the country in March led to a surge of gun sales. The Brookings Institute estimated that in March alone more than 700,000 more guns were sold than normal.
In the first seven months of 2020, Seattle processed 55% higher background checks than the city's average for the entire year. Redmond saw a 268% increase, Kirkland saw a 145% increase, and Kent saw a 119% increase.
It's clear that Initiative 1639 is even more important this year than when it was overwhelmingly passed in 2018. It prevents anyone under the age of 21 from purchasing a semi-automatic rifle. Even if you're 21 and over, it requires enhanced background checks, training requirements, and more to purchase semi-automatic rifles.
These measures save lives. This shouldn't be political -- this is really about public health. But when Loren Culp refused to enforce this law in his own county, he signaled how he'd respond to another public health crisis: ignoring mask mandates and holding large in-person rallies despite the risks due to COVID-19.
**I stand behind commonsense, evidence-based gun violence prevention measures, including Initiative 1639. It's our responsibility as leaders to support public health measures that keep our citizens safe:[If you agree, stand with me today in support of Initiative 1639 and against the hateful rhetoric of Loren Culp.](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/support-gun-violence-prevention-measures?utm_source=ema_2020-10-19_1639_&source=ema_2020-10-19_1639_&t=6&akid=8194%2E868730%2Et_6uTj)**
Very truly yours,
Jay
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/support-gun-violence-prevention-measures?utm_source=ema_2020-10-19_1639_&source=ema_2020-10-19_1639_&t=7&akid=8194%2E868730%2Et_6uTj)

body:
The far-left keeps trying to take us closer to socialism. Here’s what could happen if we let them. | |
---
[ ](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=8f07f7abc0264ae48da37d5c5eff7f0d&_e=2YD_OQcrKw87VyGHdWjnM6LSZQD6LADfz5c7CKC7xj_ji5UV84C6xm9-Gihr6vDvjaUMse3aUrMBn6DkYtmwXmKz6mDEjVTKai6Qu6FmLp6uMTbIDoIdwWnZiE4C0wCbyGPc4U9QHmoqquiN6u7POuKbXuuFMxjOHH6oufPOUQautyJHJZfXMYaGlHLNiGNWswpkVC6y-OkaIWmGG5d_gWuPUnuYSEGYjO4wqPHBBHjxIWIm1428ZzG7zVsOX9N7tG9zASXkzo0fCkR67hiV52uB7jMOKY8kBxH_e0bKDeDuw7xjwQn1gF20tMilnjaOl9PYc4sOPh-Xe_ZvC1Rp5X5fWju-G8Gyjil_-Kj_ccz2b5mK5TMP-B7yLdmCY5LNOAeEsKtVnewXyWAgWz9IlpV0VPkwHdtCtrYamwPyTEFaT8DJPGatfL9dhjp5a9IvT7UN7P8sigXLjpoQ-1hPdlUdt3psnAmxwiPj5-WVWwQ48L7F7hicXlr16styRxFz)
|
---
Friend,

Socialists have long tried to push their ideas, undermine our American values, and force their oppressive far-left policies on us.

For decades, we have rejected them. **But today, the far-left is embracing their ideas with open arms.**

Just take a look at their agenda:
* Government Run Healthcare
* Universal Basic Income
* 70% Marginal Tax Rate
* Taxpayer Subsidized College
* Green New Deal

Democrats are being pushed closer to Socialism everyday by the far-left.

We should have seen this coming...

Over time, Democrats have gradually caved to the influence of socialism, adopting one radical policy after another.

**Now, socialist policies and members of the Democratic Socialist Party can even be found in our Congress.**

And to make matters worse, the Left is attempting to teach younger generations to believe that capitalism is evil and socialism is the answer...

**That’s why this year’s election is so important, friend.**

We MUST elect leaders who will fight back against the rise of socialism in America. Leaders who will stand up for American values. **Leaders like Matt Mowers.**
|
---
[ ](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=8f07f7abc0264ae48da37d5c5eff7f0d&_e=2YD_OQcrKw87VyGHdWjnM6LSZQD6LADfz5c7CKC7xj_ji5UV84C6xm9-Gihr6vDvjaUMse3aUrMBn6DkYtmwXmKz6mDEjVTKai6Qu6FmLp6uMTbIDoIdwWnZiE4C0wCbyGPc4U9QHmoqquiN6u7POuKbXuuFMxjOHH6oufPOUQautyJHJZfXMYaGlHLNiGNWswpkVC6y-OkaIWmGG5d_gWuPUnuYSEGYjO4wqPHBBHjxIWIm1428ZzG7zVsOX9N7tG9zASXkzo0fCkR67hiV52uB7jMOKY8kBxH_e0bKDeDXxO2bF2HB-tvxg7rEB5Z3NQPQMlw1wUp7Hhc929S_goSFNH6k2UphMqjvgcY33mQ7Anh4kIcGgRddE1jYX9NqWt-nAa0ODzc0drQDDFpzs071hElJLSKlXqRSOzHfm03cBdg4PFbybJ6-6QJtrlDVgQ2-bPrYvCFm6Nasuy1bE7tCP0coeBxwqhiFYGvff6mcoEfI8WpLH31EPPBe5yBQ)
|
---
Matt knows that Bernie Sanders, Nancy Pelosi, and the Squad are taking our country in the wrong direction, and that their big socialist ideas will only lead to more government control and chaos.

**This election isn’t just about electing Republican candidates and flipping seats. It’s about electing people who will wake up every single day to fight for our freedom and values.**

**Without a doubt, Matt Mowers is one of those people.** That’s why I gave Matt my full endorsement and stood side by side with him in the Granite State to help rally support ahead of Election Day.
|

|
---
I’m going all-in to support Matt as Election Day approaches. **Friend, I hope you will join me in supporting him by donating $5, $10, $20, or whatever you can to his campaign.**
|

clean_body: The far-left keeps trying to take us closer to socialism. Here’s what could happen if we let them. | | | Friend, Socialists have long tried to push their ideas, undermine our American values, and force their oppressive far-left policies on us. For decades, we have rejected them. But today, the far-left is embracing their ideas with open arms. Just take a look at their agenda: Government Run Healthcare Universal Basic Income 70% Marginal Tax Rate Taxpayer Subsidized College Green New Deal Democrats are being pushed closer to Socialism everyday by the far-left. We should have seen this coming... Over time, Democrats have gradually caved to the influence of socialism, adopting one radical policy after another. Now, socialist policies and members of the Democratic Socialist Party can even be found in our Congress. And to make matters worse, the Left is attempting to teach younger generations to believe that capitalism is evil and socialism is the answer... That’s why this year’s election is so important, friend. We MUST elect leaders who will fight back against the rise of socialism in America. Leaders who will stand up for American values. Leaders like Matt Mowers. | | Matt knows that Bernie Sanders, Nancy Pelosi, and the Squad are taking our country in the wrong direction, and that their big socialist ideas will only lead to more government control and chaos. This election isn’t just about electing Republican candidates and flipping seats. It’s about electing people who will wake up every single day to fight for our freedom and values. Without a doubt, Matt Mowers is one of those people. That’s why I gave Matt my full endorsement and stood side by side with him in the Granite State to help rally support ahead of Election Day. | | I’m going all-in to support Matt as Election Day approaches. Friend, I hope you will join me in supporting him by donating $5, $10, $20, or whatever you can to his campaign. | | By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution: If you’ve saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically. | | Will you help send Matt Mowers to Congress? Click here to support him today: ** My very best, Nikki Haley Former Ambassador to the United Nations | While Chris Pappas can count on Nancy Pelosi's deep pockets for funding, Matt Mowers is running a campaign funded by supporters like you. Will you chip in to help him fight back against the Left? | | | | | Paid for by Mowers for Congress | | P.O. Box 10297, Bedford, N.H. 03110 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

Because she is such a strong advocate for protecting the unborn, groups like the National Right to Life are standing with Kat in her fight to take on the late-term abortion agenda of the far-left.
In addition, groups like the Republican Liberty Caucus and Tea Party Express know that Kat stands with freedom over big government, and they have also shown their support!

body:
Jeanne Shaheen abandoned the Granite State a LONG time ago. Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/03a80ab931aef3cb/170714de76b1eb45c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, Career politician Jeanne Shaheen has GOT to GO. After 30 years in politics, she’s lost touch with the Granite State. She puts the party she serves before the people she represents on every issue.

She’s raising MILLIONS from liberal mega-donors. She’s voting with the Democrat Party more often than Elizabeth Warren. And she’ll rubberstamp Chuck Schumer’s radical agenda if Democrats win the Senate majority.

**Election Day is just 15 days away — and it’s absolutely CRITICAL that we defeat D.C. Shaheen and FLIP this seat**.

**[Can you pitch in $15 or more to help Corky WIN on Election Day?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/03a80ab931aef3cb/f1232c95f4646e59c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** [CHIP IN $15 NOW!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/03a80ab931aef3cb/6035d95837b18185c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Unlike Jeanne Shaheen, Corky will ALWAYS put Granite Staters first.

It’s time for New Hampshire to send a veteran, an outsider, and a proven leader to the U.S. Senate. Jeanne Shaheen has done nothing to deserve six more years.

**With Election Day 15 days out, we’re asking each of our TOP supporters to[chip in $15](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/03a80ab931aef3cb/9ea1951fc2c0c6d1c3d6b838967d376c/33153) — or whatever you can afford — to help Corky SURGE across the finish line**.

Thanks, Team Messner [CHIP IN $200 NOW!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/03a80ab931aef3cb/ebbbe393a2d1fd35c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [CHIP IN $100 NOW!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/03a80ab931aef3cb/f68b8f2947635bc0c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [CHIP IN $50 NOW!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/03a80ab931aef3cb/e4e04f295f8ab733c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [CHIP IN $25 NOW!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/03a80ab931aef3cb/1ffb8eefecc4b7bdc3d6b838967d376c/33153) [CHIP IN $15 NOW!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/03a80ab931aef3cb/02453e9ea698422bc3d6b838967d376c/33153) [CHIP IN $5 NOW!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/03a80ab931aef3cb/076886165c2df667c3d6b838967d376c/33153) id:2020-10-08-20:38:20:257t | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/03a80ab931aef3cb/115153552e31cf58c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/03a80ab931aef3cb/00909c95e87dd0cbc3d6b838967d376c/33153)

Martha McSally has spent her career playing games and acting as a GOP rubber stamp at the expense of our community, and now she's calling for a quick confirmation of Trump's Supreme Court nominee:
[](https://act.somospac.%3D/?g=6FsAG_qMaklfgqE9dvMhfTA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/somos_weekly_oct?refcode=SOM_EM_FR_201019_Update_U1_X2&amount=25&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=somosvotantes&utm_content=9&utm_campaign=SOM_EM_FR_201019_Update_U1_X2&source=SOM_EM_FR_201019_Update_U1_X2")
Arizona's special Senate election could ENSURE we have ONE more Democrat in the Senate before a SCOTUS vote. WE need to make sure Mark WINS -- or we risk losing the Supreme Court for a GENERATION.
**Our Spanish-language Mark Kelly ads are getting Latinos in Arizona energized, but we need to do even more if we 're going to win this close race. name: Senator John Barrasso
subject: I’m running out of explanations
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF JOHN BARRASSO
body:
I'm just as frustrated as you are. I know that the American people don't want tax hikes, government-run healthcare, liberal judges on the Supreme Court, open borders or any of the far-fetched, socialist-inspired ideas the Democrats have.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KMbrmEuwXHfuevf-Pr-nYr0OI0p_Np8cKWtaad4zARALFCFvD7ZhQE9ThMhro5T6RKKX-uF4gJKKbgmVydnBNtFiKulTTF7aY5hPaSVtGj_YAnEFDF2deAEi5kCo1Xjh8UDnxpefsPL8ztKDymD9h4zbI6aLwryxqqTSnW0Dyp-hwIZuutWxs83Ld8X7r09Ibaj3FRuRATu3SC0QsUoi5MWwqQWGBzJej0EJwQFzxSVQnhrrpQuF4S88UPu-UaIG2-AN4stEEreQY7i76XJ43FJ7BSA1wlZFjO_fmQoxRaavXJ-lHG2095EGW7fnFmv8EQ0xGsiWF3NtTRdQ_1szBZbkZhChZiQY2NJCaqtHNSSl2ZiIP-rVPlvWBg6QOKvCmO5VqGUEUuplMCLRN4B1dEm5YtWDarCtd0d-lkhYRbg=&c=v6uPKYxB072NhIkVnYhBSwm8Lctlpy3cckjap5Xe2zmEzln9XFpwkg==&ch=65NI2FYwOllS5Td5xwQlBapPq3HLJup0IOjZFs_S1bxBKfiO3THBEg==)

**We are approaching the final stretch, and I 'm running out of explanations for why we're so behind the radical Left.**

I'm just as frustrated as you are.

I know that the American people don't want tax hikes, government-run healthcare, liberal judges on the Supreme Court, open borders or any of the far-fetched, socialist-inspired ideas the Democrats have.

_So what gives?_

Election day is in just over TWO WEEKS, and it will undoubtedly be the most important one of our lifetime. This election will decide the fate of our great nation for generations to come, and if we let Joe Biden steal the White House and Chuck Schumer flip the Senate, the consequences will be dire.

**If we don 't step up RIGHT NOW to help Senate Republicans, we might as well throw in the towel and turn over the keys to the Senate Majority to Schumer.**

As Senate Conference Chairman, I have pledged to fight tooth and nail for ALL Americans. I have pledged to advance our conservative values and the Republican agenda.

It's not too late to join or advance our fight. I won't go down without a fight and I hope you'll join me.

name: Mike Garcia
subject: RE: 7.5%
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Garcia for Congress
body:
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
| [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00178U7evkacSUnLtSRsV_IDM9NBLYOyr1h8hG_NMJsdgF9HySrlovvTBSQpqPc_Zv4egx1BZ_yT1hY4LTCjQypDbLctMl7HYX6wG8GiW9fRHFk34AI-ZjnOYvpQ4d6lJ02_7UiPHVfcrzt68le4DiCEvcOKsH8GNDigL4ajiAEJXOk06xrDGY-LytHPtKf78LLBuUDyGIwxqM8di6h27A9AN1c7ZFFaLRMshxQSlG0bStegFqaXHaXX6VgzoPJLgW7z5_G8APZLPMghF5G6xW-PeapRQK8sHTquORh-rMcDGE=&c=v9nnzpA0ufP9kCAkaRpmnszFdlHxt-68o8wUzvY4DUT-AoHZ2MF91g==&ch=9w8Z32NEqjlQQFHqBhj3Ntj-eqiZzCl32-qvHgYsUgsT_-frOzGleg==)
---
Friend,
---
Tonight at 11:59 P.M. PDT is the Official Voter Registration Deadline for California.
---
It pains me to tell you that Democrats have __INCREASED__ their voter registration advantage over us to _**7.5%**_ since we won the special election this May.
---
These few remaining hours of the day are our LAST CHANCE to catch up. After that, there's _nothing_ we can do.
---
_I 'd hate to think we lose this race solely because Democrats beat us in voter registration, which is why I'm going to spend an emergency $4,500 on last-minute registration efforts before tonight's official cut-off._
---

body:
---
| | | | | |

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, OCTOBER 19, 2020
KELLY LOEFFLER DOMINATES THE FIELD IN FIRST DEBATE
ATLANTA -- Today, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler emerged as the clear winner of the Atlanta Press Club special election debate - handily dispatching Raphael Warnock, Doug Collins, and others in the first debate matchup ahead of Election Day. To view highlights from the debate, click the photo below:
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VA0s4UdJSTEskljbqUbF-1m_NN_-rJZk9-pesqLNnYDfwEC9p7u-3pHs86Gh86OSsQfMZ5ehZKKQAe_h3iJ4IHi1FRstDvf_uZ7pm-0PR8JpH_lWIaU1F8DFYWC28_9--CDiJGaIuecw6uLHF2IeCaX0iddntY3mjFNGVW5Pe5QGvkWA3ata6dYRbDRqIimP&c=D18Ds6WVlHJ6LbLqz6ANaNALIEWNFwCa16GobuRAmIVjmkusbgz9bA==&ch=yygHxQNmseHhmU4yDepNEj4462Xrv2bxnMGoP0cC7wWkIJyuBiKj0g==)
---
| "After today's debate, the choice has never been clearer for Georgia's voters: as a conservative businesswoman and political outsider, Kelly Loeffler is the only candidate who has a strong record of delivering results for Georgia families. Radical Raphael Warnock tried and failed to hide his plans to socialize healthcare, enact the Green New Deal, open our borders, and pass a radical abortion-on-demand agenda. Doug Collins was exposed for what he is: a desperate career politician and one of the most liberal Republicans in Congress who has voted with Stacey Abrams and Nancy Pelosi hundreds of times to raise taxes, weaken the 2nd Amendment, and put criminals back on the street," said Communications Director Stephen Lawson. "Kelly Loeffler demonstrated today that she is the only candidate Georgians can trust to create jobs, protect our conservative values, and deliver results in the United States Senate--and that's exactly what she will continue to do."
Senator Loeffler's strong debate performance is only the latest victory for her campaign, which maintains a [significant](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VA0s4UdJSTEskljbqUbF-1m_NN_-rJZk9-pesqLNnYDfwEC9p7u-3oDq_EXf0xY_3qxhRvJMyVz9rW9VFyWW9740osvecBGZ59Gf2VYpMZp2eTIg9dpotST9hVMslqhOcQ0axNiZA2w62v1KIS6hLklA9TRn42R7&c=D18Ds6WVlHJ6LbLqz6ANaNALIEWNFwCa16GobuRAmIVjmkusbgz9bA==&ch=yygHxQNmseHhmU4yDepNEj4462Xrv2bxnMGoP0cC7wWkIJyuBiKj0g==) financial advantage, organized grassroots [support](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VA0s4UdJSTEskljbqUbF-1m_NN_-rJZk9-pesqLNnYDfwEC9p7u-3gJWNN61MfKSkWMSyqCM3U48wtV2NEv8mWKH5rYLZWtXfv9YDTwpkyvPaaX00ND0Fmod01SSS1w9CvFKSor2RaUNqFUiUr4FjMN8XlcDNOydEy00G7lL5Wk=&c=D18Ds6WVlHJ6LbLqz6ANaNALIEWNFwCa16GobuRAmIVjmkusbgz9bA==&ch=yygHxQNmseHhmU4yDepNEj4462Xrv2bxnMGoP0cC7wWkIJyuBiKj0g==) in all 159 counties, a [robust](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VA0s4UdJSTEskljbqUbF-1m_NN_-rJZk9-pesqLNnYDfwEC9p7u-3uIVRngcWfC8iCVR3YcMLYfg98eQi8r8KphCg2PPeiolkhXzoOhagTtoiwbh-SpUc8j82e0bfXufCQR52kfqqhldpWLPYPaSxKtmtQlqAmwkpQQ98dDiFFA=&c=D18Ds6WVlHJ6LbLqz6ANaNALIEWNFwCa16GobuRAmIVjmkusbgz9bA==&ch=yygHxQNmseHhmU4yDepNEj4462Xrv2bxnMGoP0cC7wWkIJyuBiKj0g==) voter outreach program, the [endorsement](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VA0s4UdJSTEskljbqUbF-1m_NN_-rJZk9-pesqLNnYDfwEC9p7u-3gJWNN61MfKSkWMSyqCM3U48wtV2NEv8mWKH5rYLZWtXfv9YDTwpkyvPaaX00ND0Fmod01SSS1w9CvFKSor2RaUNqFUiUr4FjMN8XlcDNOydEy00G7lL5Wk=&c=D18Ds6WVlHJ6LbLqz6ANaNALIEWNFwCa16GobuRAmIVjmkusbgz9bA==&ch=yygHxQNmseHhmU4yDepNEj4462Xrv2bxnMGoP0cC7wWkIJyuBiKj0g==) of over 150 elected officials from across the state, and the [support](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VA0s4UdJSTEskljbqUbF-1m_NN_-rJZk9-pesqLNnYDfwEC9p7u-3gJWNN61MfKSkWMSyqCM3U48wtV2NEv8mWKH5rYLZWtXfv9YDTwpkyvPaaX00ND0Fmod01SSS1w9CvFKSor2RaUNqFUiUr4FjMN8XlcDNOydEy00G7lL5Wk=&c=D18Ds6WVlHJ6LbLqz6ANaNALIEWNFwCa16GobuRAmIVjmkusbgz9bA==&ch=yygHxQNmseHhmU4yDepNEj4462Xrv2bxnMGoP0cC7wWkIJyuBiKj0g==) of dozens of national conservative leaders. subject: Trump Is Strengthening Border Security, Keeping Violent Criminals and Illegal Drugs Out of US
body:
Anyone who cares about establishing an orderly immigration system and ending the flow of illegal drugs, violent criminals and human traffickers... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4908386a2c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump Is Strengthening Border Security, Keeping Violent Criminals and Illegal Drugs Out of US**

“Anyone who cares about establishing an orderly immigration system and ending the flow of illegal drugs, violent criminals and human traffickers coming across our southern border should take heart from the undeniable fact that President Trump’s administration is winning the fight for border security,” National Border Patrol Council President Brandon Judd writes for Fox News.

“This is proof of a profound change in the dynamics of migration in a direction most Americans have long supported.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0be5cfc8e4&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Israel and Bahrain on Sunday formally declared that they have made peace and established formal diplomatic relations, only the fourth such agreement between the Jewish state and an Arab country,” Raphael Ahren reports. Treasury Secretary Steven Mnuchin represented the Trump Administration, which helped broker the deal. Read more in [_The Times of Israel_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9e2b880970&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “A top Federal Communications Commission staffer blasted Twitter” for freezing the _New York Post’s_ Twitter account—while Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei is still free to tweet. “The dictator—who once called for the destruction of Israel on the social media site—has posted at least six tweets since Wednesday, when The Post’s account was blocked,” Tamar Lapin reports for the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=acf3a8a60b&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Health care in America is too bureaucratic, costly, and complex. Self-styled ‘progressive’ politicians claim they have a ‘remedy’ for that; namely, the creation of a new government-run health plan,” four policy experts from the Heritage Foundation write. “If progressives were to enact their massive demolition project, they claim that American health care will be superior . . . Don’t believe it.” Read more in [_The Daily Signal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7b2dcc3218&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

body:
We’re in the final sprint of this marathon. We have 15 days left until we cast our ballots in the most consequential election we’ve seen thus far in Peter, We’re in the final sprint of this marathon.
We have 15 days left until we cast our ballots in the most consequential election we’ve seen thus far in our lifetime.

body:
| |
---
**WEEK IN REVIEW**
**Less than 2 and half weeks until Election Day!**

Team Mace is out in full force to Get Out The Vote. Make your voice heard this election. We have door knockers and phone bankers working every day to help Lowcountry folks know their options for casting their ballots.

As you can expect, it's been a busy week. We released our 6th ad titled "Your Job" outlining Democrat Incumbent Joe Cunningham's failure to protect Parris Island.

**📺[WATCH Nancy's Newest TV ad, "Your Job"](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=9460b1fef4c14248a1210b8d675e47c0&_e=5X6taCXzPg1BH0nyxAu-A-WGya223MMTsYXDZCnJOO-Xtcq1m_7hq9lzR_kWPNBsGbQU-Ai0JQkd_CQB23kMvv5vW_M6UMHpuuhJaS6eHr41_dZ9d1qlxBypCAM5Pu3UqXjgBcPs1yLoIpfEKsKAltZJIQzQSKrwjVzTeYHKmbMn9ayAZpLM0WKGVRbfKa0qv85A3pDCFtfvB96PUpcaX0nK0lKbrc5rcX67woubRmg1rYtuV5aIBcEJH8kTLPS-kPI926p7W2bQ4tU3WrPR-kSF-DR_nFhmtb6-9sBDjZnSzhWavI7VsjGhER6df5t3lebNEeg6-S8kNqx8dAH3bx1J53FNvsdWZj09kVIIjrPOwHjhTkUG11RRd16U8IUFX6TlkvDijlyPqBMDmFicgbFvixGiXRYEw2KiDU4X8D4%3D) 📺**

Nancy cast her ballot in Moncks Corner earlier this week alongside other Berkeley county voters, and shortly after Team Mace found out we not only out-raised Democrat Joe Cunningham in Q3, but we have more money in the bank as we enter the final weeks of the campaign!

Nancy joined Senator Lindsey Graham for a Friday rally to #FillTheSeat and Judge Amy Coney Barrett confirmed. It's time to Fill the Seat and put an incredibly qualified conservative woman on the Court.

And just today Republican Tennessee Senator Marsha Blackburn announced her endorsement of Nancy! Watch that below.

Keep up with our Week in Review to hear from Team Mace each week. Invite your friends and family to sign up at nancymace.org. 📩

Thank you for your support!

-Mara, Campaign Manager
|

Team Mace has out-raised Democrat Incumbent Joe Cunningham in Q3! Not only that, we have more cash on hand than he does going into the final weeks of this race. That is because of supporters like you! . On Friday, Senator Graham invited Nancy to join him for a rally to Fill the Seat and confirm Judge Amy Coney Barrett to the U.S. Supreme Court in North Charleston. - On Sunday, Senator Marsha Blackburn (R-TN) announced her endorsement of Nancy Mace for Congress. "Senator Blackburn is an amazing leader and a role model for conservative women everywhere — it’s truly special to know that she has my back." MEET THE CANDIDATES On Saturday, Nancy joined candidates across Charleston County and Lowcountry republicans at Wando River Grill to talk early voting and getting out our #LowcountryFirst message. Thank you to Elizabeth and Max Dillon for hosting! | | | Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress | | 295 Seven Farms Drive C-186 Charleston, SC 29492 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

War taught me to NEVER surrender.
---
Even during the most hopeless moments on the battlefield, I never gave up hope.
---
**Losing my right leg didn 't even stop me from pedaling 112 miles in an Ironman.**
---
_So when I was told that Virginia is permanently lost to the Democrats, I REFUSED to accept it._
---
_How could I just give up on the Commonwealth I 'm proud to call my home?_
---
Now we see what happens when we refuse to give up and keep fighting. We managed to outraise one of the most well-funded politicians in the Senate by $200,000.
---
**But our David vs. Goliath battle isn 't over. And these final couple of weeks will either make or break our campaign.**
---
Friend, you have my word: I will fight every waking hour to take back this Senate seat from Warner's control -- and I hope you'll fight by my side until the final vote is cast.

name: Marcy, Team Warner Digital Director
subject: A real person is writing these
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Hi, Derek!

I'm Marcy, the digital director for Mark Warner's campaign. As we get into the final stretch of campaign season, I'm sure your inbox is full of requests from causes that you care about. I wanted to take a minute to explain why these emails are so critically important to our campaign.

**_So much of our campaign funding comes from our email program._**

It's a really critical piece of our fundraising strategy, and the money this program brings in helps us reach voters like you, all across the Commonwealth. My goal for this month is to make sure our team has the funds needed to reach as many voters as possible across the Commonwealth before November 3rd. And to do that, we need help from folks like you.

**[So, if you have the means, please consider chipping in to help Mark's campaign end on a high note.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da37/53d9897e/5549068c/1c88fb82/2492144467/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg4NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-final?refcode=20201019_f_1_nd__886__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

As we take health precautions to keep Mark's constituents safe during this campaign, digital work has become even more important, as we do our best to reach Virginians where they are -- whether that's in their newsfeed or on the sidebar of a news article. $5 really does a difference when it comes to our digital program -- it helps put more money behind digital ads that are working to expand the reach of our message.

If you take anything away from this email, know that real people are writing these (and reading the responses!) and that we're grateful for everyone on Team Warner. Thank you for everything you do to move us forward -- none of this work would be possible without you.

-- Marcy, Team Warner Digital Director

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da37/53d9897e/5549068c/1c88fb81/2492144467/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg4NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-final?refcode=20201019_f_1_nd__886__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Team Fair Fight Action
subject: Georgia - it's time to return your mail-in ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa48f/34a064cc/1a027a58/702c46c/4098176385/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - Voting is under way in Georgia, and national pundits are ranking Georgia the MOST competitive state in the country! That means your vote is more important than ever. Whether you are casting your ballot in person or by mail, make sure your voice is heard. Don't panic and don't delay. **REQUESTED A VOTE-BY-MAIL BALLOT? ** If you have requested a mail ballot -- great! Don't have your ballot yet? You can track your ballot and sign up for updates about the status of your ballot [here](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa48f/34a064cc/1a027a58/702c46d/4098176385/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://georgia.ballottrax.net/voter/"). Have your ballot? Return it as soon as possible! Follow the instructions provided to fill out your ballot. Make sure you use a blue or black pen and fill in the ovals to the left of your preferred candidates completely. Check-marks won't get accepted, you must completely fill in the oval. When you're done filling out your ballot, make sure you sign the oath on the outside of the envelope. Once you've completed your ballot and you're ready to return it, drop it off at a secure and convenient drop box -- available in most counties (like Stacey Abrams did!), or at your county elections office, available in all counties. See all your drop off location options [here](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa48f/34a064cc/1a027a58/702c46a/4098176385/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com/locate"). You can also mail your ballot using U.S. Mail today. In Georgia, you can check to make sure your vote was counted with [this tool](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa48f/34a064cc/1a027a58/702c46d/4098176385/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://georgia.ballottrax.net/voter/"). When your ballot is marked as "ACCEPTED," that means: YOU DID IT! Your ballot was received and your vote will be counted for the November 3 General Election. **VOTING IN-PERSON?** If you're planning to vote in person, remember that early in-person voting is happening now and continues through October 30. Make your plan to vote early! Find your county's early voting locations, dates, and times at [IWillVote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa48f/34a064cc/1a027a58/702c46b/4098176385/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://IWillVote.com") or by calling either 866-OUR-VOTE (866-687-8683) or your county [Board of Elections](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa48f/34a064cc/1a027a58/702c468/4098176385/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://elections.sos.ga.gov/Elections/countyelectionoffices.do"). Review [this list of acceptable IDs](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa48f/34a064cc/1a027a58/702c469/4098176385/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://sos.ga.gov/index.php/elections/georgia_voter_identification_requirements2") to make sure you have everything you need when you head to the polls. Georgia is fired up for this election. Join over a million of your fellow Georgians who have already voted by returning or casting your ballot today. If you have questions or need help, you are always welcome to call 866-OUR-VOTE (866-687-8683). Thank you for voting, Team Fair Fight Action |
---|---|---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa48f/34a064cc/1a027a58/702c476/4098176385/VEsO/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa48f/34a064cc/1a027a58/702c477/4098176385/VEsP/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa48f/34a064cc/1a027a58/702c474/4098176385/VEsHBQ/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

This is the last call to make your refundable donation to the House DFL count towards this report. **Please consider making a fully refundable $50 (or $100 per couple) contribution before midnight tonight.** Minnesota residents can take advantage of this program once per year through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program. _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ [**Refundable $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ME4BCg4LJ-i09CW2yaKETQjIfLuFl6D9-3NhTJzZKd0=/uuoVi9MTP4Zc85TJNshzVGRydb4Lhyrn8VBZfeKhmXA=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=101920-2) [**Refundable $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ME4BCg4LJ-i09CW2yaKETQjIfLuFl6D9-3NhTJzZKd0=/uuoVi9MTP4Zc85TJNshzVGRydb4Lhyrn8VBZfeKhmXA=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=101920-2) _You can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be refunded to you by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program._ We have 15 days left to finish the work of protecting & growing our House DFL Majority. clean_body: | | Friend, There are six hours left until we close the books on the final campaign finance deadline of this election cycle. This is the last call to make your refundable donation to the House DFL count towards this report. Please consider making a fully refundable $50 (or $100 per couple) contribution before midnight tonight. Minnesota residents can take advantage of this program once per year through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program. If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately You can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be refunded to you by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program. We have 15 days left to finish the work of protecting & growing our House DFL Majority. Together, we can reject Trump's hateful and divisive politics and build a better future for all Minnesotans. Thank you, House DFL Team | Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus. name: Betsy
subject: Let's get this on the air
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
Peter, With an onslaught of attack ads hitting tvs in my district, I wanted to make sure I set the record straight. Take a minute to watch our newest ad ↓ ↓ ↓ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZCxFFV90IOATMNyS7H3M-9DbEWykTvEs3fQA8PxX31w=/Dy4xmfsezBAGwh9AjzMRAmvyTjxQEUSrdPO598VlSqE=?v=UIndE68xuos&ab_channel=BetsyRaderforOhio) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZCxFFV90IOATMNyS7H3M-9DbEWykTvEs3fQA8PxX31w=/f5Ozsm0JaorfDvV13xw9xK2fui6Xn6dX_j6QXx7_1FE=?refcode=ad10.19) _Right now, the Republicans know the truth. _ **The truth is **that they are scared. **The truth is** the polls show I win if voters hear my message. **The truth is **my opponent is too extreme for this district (_see [www.jerrycirinoextreme.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZCxFFV90IOATMNyS7H3M-9DbEWykTvEs3fQA8PxX31w=/xxbHBORvSbJGkkscumBoQuVormHHNvcqud5-U3c9168=) for examples_). **The truth is their only path to victory is to spend hundreds of thousands of dollars to tell vicious lies to the voters about what I stand for. ** But without your support, we won't be able to get this on the air enough for voters to __hear__ the truth. **[We need to raise another $9,655 via email by Thursday in order to make an ad buy on Friday.](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZCxFFV90IOATMNyS7H3M-9DbEWykTvEs3fQA8PxX31w=/f5Ozsm0JaorfDvV13xw9xK2fui6Xn6dX_j6QXx7_1FE=?refcode=ad10.19&amount=20) ****[If you can, chipping in $20 today will help get us there. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZCxFFV90IOATMNyS7H3M-9DbEWykTvEs3fQA8PxX31w=/f5Ozsm0JaorfDvV13xw9xK2fui6Xn6dX_j6QXx7_1FE=?refcode=ad10.19&amount=20)** Then, please forward this to 5 friends who need to know the truth, and encourage them to support me (and vote!) With your support, we can flip this open seat. Please don't let them drown out our voices. We don't have to keep playing politics as usual. Thank you so much. Sincerely, [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZCxFFV90IOATMNyS7H3M-9DbEWykTvEs3fQA8PxX31w=/f5Ozsm0JaorfDvV13xw9xK2fui6Xn6dX_j6QXx7_1FE=?refcode=ad10.19&amount=15) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZCxFFV90IOATMNyS7H3M-9DbEWykTvEs3fQA8PxX31w=/f5Ozsm0JaorfDvV13xw9xK2fui6Xn6dX_j6QXx7_1FE=?refcode=ad10.19&amount=50) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZCxFFV90IOATMNyS7H3M-9DbEWykTvEs3fQA8PxX31w=/f5Ozsm0JaorfDvV13xw9xK2fui6Xn6dX_j6QXx7_1FE=?refcode=ad10.19&amount=255) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZCxFFV90IOATMNyS7H3M-9DbEWykTvEs3fQA8PxX31w=/f5Ozsm0JaorfDvV13xw9xK2fui6Xn6dX_j6QXx7_1FE=?refcode=ad10.19&amount=100) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZCxFFV90IOATMNyS7H3M-9DbEWykTvEs3fQA8PxX31w=/f5Ozsm0JaorfDvV13xw9xK2fui6Xn6dX_j6QXx7_1FE=?refcode=ad10.19) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZCxFFV90IOATMNyS7H3M-9DbEWykTvEs3fQA8PxX31w=/byFiZjTx7IQ-Gj3UB3qVxAawfMDyGvslDoPtYE54DoE=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZCxFFV90IOATMNyS7H3M-9DbEWykTvEs3fQA8PxX31w=/vpZUEP0iFBwt9yQp4-mvBwIn8aofMgclSVj1wogkZsc=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZCxFFV90IOATMNyS7H3M-9DbEWykTvEs3fQA8PxX31w=/nw46QCvHYKCpXh441Q9KKpx7PwatWWY6gwvttrqfDWU=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZCxFFV90IOATMNyS7H3M-9DbEWykTvEs3fQA8PxX31w=/xsehsq7iWgX2LW7Nhi0Fwxsid25OhSCiho6fMH4BNaA=)

body:
Are you sick of the HARASSMENT, the calls to DEFUND, and the ATTACKS on our police? | |
---
[ ](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=1662b4d4f96d403bb4fe59f67f69637d&_e=TRWrtJi7biW2UewC0Bjl_hsf9lyHreCO_ehpXrztxdmCBhjwRHQCGlRWAK4u6-moq7uxgLXsXX5MRdMYIRBQAZuTc_1_v22alZEZ8jGLWUOKVO08Sa7uuWJQa20__4tWN_ByxqxQQ6oHrWgk3Dzi0RdHCQf38Vp08kvEIuvb_KQHtigK_O1bIkl4fni9O6fiT2IYwhtoj3q0waVTlZdAHgIxRU9wJMEWD5IpKPWzDObxuXPomN2lG6NfZk1DLJbDRd-0JoRqqF2c5_LreKpZuR08j7hZWPUNQTgXaEO5zkHF4LSXE7a5xUubKWtXPTTAk0QjiEMwliPkjuvyNbMldcKiPyy7R2Ri4jfPycsRUMyA8p41Da0FTm2tVIgTC1k6qEsBVb7PORc9PAjty2h1rq-Ov2DoxoKfb_F1GfLcebPI0ubVkQxMiTUHAFFABZWu)
Peter,

Peter,

Republicans have few offensive opportunities this year – and quite frankly, one of the best shots our Party has to flip a House seat this cycle is the seat I’m running for in Oregon.

ICYMI – _Politico_ released an article last week which really captures the mood here on the ground in Oregon: **_“senior Democrats have grown nervous and officials acknowledge the race will be closer than they’d like.”_**

| [**Help Me
Take Down a Dem Chairman** **› › **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bdf4a8753c8043f1b432c8781b291205&_e=8cTQnk4p2n64IUGfdLzOz_kpGsnXdDpTiyQbtaYCYyayP7fGF74xJ-EWq4Uz3fMlWk4zbxcGSF2c65WwCQxuBK14I1XdfvTtl989PNXm6p1_H81L5B5upNnF29a1mgYNBt8JwECQafOHINBT9-84cXtlkV4Z-XkivCneMILOh_oo4bQoj27Yd9Qv2TYafRHjD3k8VEtCwNbpIayEw8trIRu6YPOO0fjAcW37KfsEDJ4AOe_lR2TyONfoSmwVgQZIZJ6yO_n1h-RThHo81nuIYU06VeoZYePbPgQ9ZBnzH68V3WVLYe6ZQhAxLZhWDsDI6_5rRajqU28D78oaACWp3Q%3D%3D)
---

My opponent recognized that I am the guy who has the best shot at sending him into retirement, so he dialed up Nancy Pelosi and asked her to send in some air support. Of course, she acquiesced, and now **our best estimates put Democrats’ total spending in this race at more than $2.6 million.** DeFazio is one of their MVPs and they’re going to do everything they can to defeat me in 15 short days.

**[I’m going to lose this race if we can’t match their spending dollar-for-dollar. Please, I too need some air support. It’s now or never.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bdf4a8753c8043f1b432c8781b291205&_e=8cTQnk4p2n64IUGfdLzOz_kpGsnXdDpTiyQbtaYCYyayP7fGF74xJ-EWq4Uz3fMlWk4zbxcGSF2c65WwCQxuBK14I1XdfvTtl989PNXm6p1_H81L5B5upNnF29a1mgYNWbtQGFD9RBMzLfRJ6mvhg3ay2Kpqd67d98KkLFuSfdk_-ZZ7bHFNjFZ83XlcnFJOEHq74HzykkuiX17H8hC0ubs1qVzdb6kHX-pZMvGtSzy6hjZni1F9kYrYmDcyaR5RQEciOAwYlsC4B57JOxzvxJfQ0lWbouBdgiFmc5rjvntkbrm5AH9VJKTRtxHC9j3XCjqI5y6Sz-EAY8vvj6aq0Q%3D%3D)**

[**Donate To My Victory Fund** **› › **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bdf4a8753c8043f1b432c8781b291205&_e=8cTQnk4p2n64IUGfdLzOz_kpGsnXdDpTiyQbtaYCYyayP7fGF74xJ-EWq4Uz3fMlWk4zbxcGSF2c65WwCQxuBK14I1XdfvTtl989PNXm6p1_H81L5B5upNnF29a1mgYNUEvie9dPKZ1IVoqhvyM8LwZo4qrzMMdEMZq7Keaqizzpr4UO7pFkbvIFGOMLLL28oVJhjS7NbSh507A5lztsj0xmDJSO5IysPKWHUaBVfunrtrWJLtDjOCOuXYIhaKu2gJjhMw0a7Q-pyNnB_ZL6lgEWqpQMDV8wS1YqaijMbREkoHqaLAnOBAJOu_kjmpss8CYmO0n-QT_D0ZvBcQ3irA%3D%3D)
---

From the very beginning, this campaign has been built on the generosity of small-dollar donors, and that is how I plan to finish it. **Your support** has enabled us to nationalize this race and force Nancy Pelosi and national Democrats to spend big bucks in defense of my opponent.

We have Democrats on the run – but **my fundraising numbers seems to be stalling out at the worst possible time** ; I just checked and we’re a full $55,000 behind where we were at this point in September.

As a personal favor to me, **[would you please consider making a gift of any amount to my campaign right now to help us get back on track?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bdf4a8753c8043f1b432c8781b291205&_e=8cTQnk4p2n64IUGfdLzOz_kpGsnXdDpTiyQbtaYCYyayP7fGF74xJ-EWq4Uz3fMlWk4zbxcGSF2c65WwCQxuBK14I1XdfvTtl989PNXm6p1_H81L5B5upNnF29a1mgYNwMdReY93bYmZp0rXiBzQC4l6CjNfFVXLRfVi2nxXX-Ti4Ko8n9TVziskbOe6_p_3pFstyZQQH4AjpdkeNeDC9aVjvGnvVT7FSOcuPYWeqZgk2Rw4Niis1RNnGzSe0L5DnmIUJ6C7GFg3AyiTeW6LY0Xq7M7j2ty0ussrmzy2t0RJECqv5x1K87k60gMlnXkRxeIv1LVzYJhGmyguFb-hKg%3D%3D)**

body:
We are launching a nationwide TV ad campaign calling out the liberals for the bigotry, and calling on the Senate to confirm Amy Coney Barrett. [ ](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=cd9aaff20522462ca6464724d88d86b8&_e=uN4c_mlmUK8BPx_B-MyneP2zqt6xmvmZnjCBna9kSWYYYHuN5yvkXD-4PPNxrkVzV9NiYSyLpgE8QLn4wCC84z0leBCg8sTVNWGuXNQ-b_yoeOOAZy4hf0sfuSJDHNr0YfG2u_itM2quywRstHNpp_8YpVB0NAlrh3GMPKwg9dyhUFAvwVxaprfvVMbmHKvnE_OOf21NMrHHShAJObcB9LJSdtDDSjiqDTgOopHmGu54gy4N7oHr9i0sTJqs_bYB) | |

Fellow American,
We are launching a nationwide TV ad campaign calling out the liberals for the bigotry, and calling on the Senate to confirm Amy Coney Barrett. _**_We want you to be the first to see it!_**_

[ ](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=cd9aaff20522462ca6464724d88d86b8&_e=fLCiHiwTl0Xsj_crmtzI78wQrqpjEBQrrJ-IduJvjXh_pdSa7fDGFo-F9TvgFoAWqALO1AQPVluGsN6NtIR_g8ZojyU3drhDM3ZwBhOjhP_UCWCgaNZIFaY7VQl1Jkezc1Ez3iiw1DPeU58dk4xNgBO8bSyrBB6hcI2GGHGFjepEKfFYVdwfaS0ymvRMrdyml-SaEafFLcZCGxS0BfyPPmkmMSSa9FGgJmZiMIjgFVyXz4R-f90D7l8rr-5l4NVRbsl2QS5RmYTmHKYG6HBz1L6sni1UqU0fAK_o5JClRv0QrShfW08VZADqvViDrZyd)
|
---

**We are asking for URGENT donations to make sure Amy Coney Barrett is the next Supreme Court Justice.**
[_**DONATE NOW!**_](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=cd9aaff20522462ca6464724d88d86b8&_e=fLCiHiwTl0Xsj_crmtzI78wQrqpjEBQrrJ-IduJvjXh_pdSa7fDGFo-F9TvgFoAWqALO1AQPVluGsN6NtIR_g8ZojyU3drhDM3ZwBhOjhP9rdl8CuEHnATTKG4cead6N-zujZTFxZSS6v2m9nKc52YuwsvF7x8GfWZ4CC0BxwRVP62734um_R3rgvomKROVHEbSMdKAKl42lMBLcludSo_u2Yw5w9RgzwIbnxRnt64c0vVZu_JfVdaWrGWZUWCtA58keDN1wf6i-GZIEzCENApu8O_DQ-2LXB4xxzj-VqV9JMOOVvDkXpn08Th9Y2Qje)
Last week, Josh Hawley laid out a great point about how the liberals and the media have launched attack after attack on Amy Coney Barrett’s religious beliefs, spitting in the face of our Constitution. Josh noted how Dick Durbin and other members on the committee asked Amy Coney Barrett if she was an orthodox Catholic, and other questions regarding her faith.

These questions of faith bring back an old standard that the Constitution explicitly forbids. _**Liberals are posing a religious test for office!**_
[_**Fight to Uphold Our Constitution >>>**_](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=cd9aaff20522462ca6464724d88d86b8&_e=fLCiHiwTl0Xsj_crmtzI78wQrqpjEBQrrJ-IduJvjXh_pdSa7fDGFo-F9TvgFoAWqALO1AQPVluGsN6NtIR_g8ZojyU3drhDM3ZwBhOjhP9qT2480fg_EIEa-uLJCbYyPS8hzyjBJRpZ69DsIDl2_WmVM6SsHzhQ4Q04tayvh2MB5RjaEVLaDQPBoQ3yTRJzRFR3-XknnhZSPexGqN61Fg9zrPGiTfionpRHwK419SV6LHFdddBoBoz3lhD_oT41i8Ryid3hKT-QNV7zr9HX9vgVm18S6lCzelUPKNnOPu2f_uUuBwZO3kpYY-GLfobf)
As Josh noted, "Article Six of the Constitution of the United States says clearly... 'no religious test shall ever be required as a qualification to any office or public trust under the United States.'"

**We cannot allow the liberals to impose unconstitutional religious tests whenever they please.** _Join us today to uphold Article 6 and the rest of our Constitution!_
[**Donate _HERE_**](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=cd9aaff20522462ca6464724d88d86b8&_e=fLCiHiwTl0Xsj_crmtzI78wQrqpjEBQrrJ-IduJvjXh_pdSa7fDGFo-F9TvgFoAWqALO1AQPVluGsN6NtIR_g8ZojyU3drhDM3ZwBhOjhP_xN1DxpWyI6XVkZ0Y-83zCbyRCb8L9Ixd5LeQEN4WFt3LmV_QQzzOaBl4KrhsfNNLM4N7BZUgKz7KPJ0xf5FgZiqlhaSB2AAQSHIf3AlF4velZ8VnvRhbkKmqqD2qBTS7GsBjcKCzoQY2wg9aJXZUOO-ozQB3bRh6gJ0G7jUDuLHXw5QaEnYPRiIV-WisgnwE2M08KcAhq8ntP9g_jMYoh)
Sincerely,

Bobby Jindal
_**Visit[AmericaNext.org](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=cd9aaff20522462ca6464724d88d86b8&_e=fLCiHiwTl0Xsj_crmtzI74g8xRnYLDCl7QbMovd8Ksi_JKKIVICtxa-FjVveRowi43u76jSDjdAZ_Y1W5KuIn85LN0678eE5K3cRnHyvKi91Trfkqpi3-2oOEsfqu2jg5c4rqBJTsGlQzfi1YNAE-E1t_i8469ZO7b3P5RP1XcFAb4Gqh1ZuZnJXaZ5-7c2GS21NCAk6E5pzDlpERoXE9-VuwzxYC3IWRhijfCE3Bi8tTEOKw5UCrZvfp7NpGsG75S1DmHynqK34UB15-rWhUA%3D%3D) for more information.**_

Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by America Next

body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=f_WcUbojfF6OuRU&b=nU6yZL7jmYUQCL2yGJ5N8w

Hi Peter,

71%.

My Democrat opponent gets 71% of his money from Swamp political action committees- and that's who he is loyal to!

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who dominated my primary and willwin alongside President Trump in my Florida swing district

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=f_WcUbojfF6OuRU&b=nU6yZL7jmYUQCL2yGJ5N8w
!

Part of the reason I won my primary is because I raised by far the most money in the field- and now I've mounted the stiffest Republican opposition Rep. Soto has ever faced!

I'll take my 4,000 individual donors over the 3/4 of his money raised by dirty, Swampy PACs anytime!

See, this is how we get the Swamp. Nancy Pelosi sells out to the Swamp, and strongarms PACs to give money to her loyal lieutenants.

Soto has been loyal; 95% voting with Pelosi. She says "jump!", and he answers "how high?"

If you wonder how we get bad policy like Obamacare, or impeachment, or any of Pelosi's other pet projects, this is why!

Let's take a look at where Rep. Soto gets some of his money, shall we?

-Most of his contributions come from the infamous dark money site ActBlue. This site funnelled millions in untraceable foreign contributions to Dem candidates over the last decade.

-Wall Street banks chipped in with a bunch, including foreign banks like UBS.

-Federal employees backed their champion with thousands.

-Big Pharma backed their Obamacare-loving champion, Darren Soto. In fact, nearly every single big Pharma company's PAC gave to Soto!

-Big unions, like SEIU, came up big for Soto as well!

Well, I'm not a Pelosi stooge. No one bought me off. I'm raising money, but I'm doing it the honest way- from patriots like you!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=f_WcUbojfF6OuRU&b=nU6yZL7jmYUQCL2yGJ5N8w

Think for a moment about everything you hate about the Swamp. All of that is present in liberal Darren Soto!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=f_WcUbojfF6OuRU&b=nU6yZL7jmYUQCL2yGJ5N8w

It's time to demand better! If you want leadership different from Pelosi.... if you hate the Swamp, if you want a Congress who will work with President Trump, then I need you right now!

Join my 4,000 patriots who want to drain the Swamp! I need your help to beat the far Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=f_WcUbojfF6OuRU&b=nU6yZL7jmYUQCL2yGJ5N8w

Trump needs Florida, and Florida is close! My district is a key swing district that has been held by the Republicans this decade, and Trump needs it to swing Republican.

It's all on the line here. If I win, Pelosi won't be Speaker. If we win here, Trump will win Florida. This is it!

I need your help to stand up AGAINST Pelosi and the Swamp!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Scott?=
subject: Forum on Leadership, Civility and Unity with Governors Phil Scott, Charlie Baker and Larry Hogan
body:
October 22 @ 6:30 pm |
---
| | [ ](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=967171b621&e=19cebfe173)
---
| Friend,

At a time when our nation feels so divided, we need more leaders who rise above partisanship and treat everyone – even when they disagree – with the dignity and respect they deserve.

This Thursday at 6:30 PM, Governor Phil Scott, Governor Charlie Baker of Massachusetts and Governor Larry Hogan of Maryland will participate in a virtual forum on leadership, civility and unity to discuss how we can come together and move our states and nation forward.

You can watch live on [Facebook](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=dd97397bc3&e=19cebfe173), [YouTube](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=b140929bcb&e=19cebfe173) or at [philscott.org/live](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=2a8b1cb23b&e=19cebfe173).

If you have questions for the governors, [you can submit them by clicking here](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=a2ce1f13bc&e=19cebfe173). We will try to get to as many as possible.

Thank you, and we hope you can tune in Thursday evening!

\- Team Scott

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: UPDATE: New border wall nears 400 miles
body:
President Trump is in Arizona today, where average family incomes hit a record high and the poverty rate hit a record low... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b8d2ba568c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • October 19, 2020
---
| | |
# **UPDATE: New border wall nears 400 miles**

**President Trump is in Arizona** today, where average family incomes hit a record high and the poverty rate hit a record low in 2019 after just three years of President Trump’s pro-growth, pro-worker policies.

**Arizona, much like** the rest of our country, also benefited from President Trump’s commitments to secure our border and fix America’s broken immigration system.

**As of today,** more than 370 miles of new border wall is complete. Just as important, the Trump Administration is prosecuting and deporting violent criminals, stopping the flow of illegal drugs, and closing loopholes that help smugglers and hurt our own citizens.

**“The refugee system** —set up to provide refuge for victims of war and persecution who had nowhere else to go, often on an explicitly temporary basis—had long since become a racket,” National Border Patrol Council President Brandon Judd writes.

“**It provided prestigious jobs** in Washington for ‘resettlement experts’ and taxpayer money for glorified slumlords, while generating massive fallout for unsuspecting American communities. Today the system has finally been returned to its proper role.”

**With other strong actions **from the Trump Administration, including building the border wall, apprehensions for illegal immigration dropped 70% between last May and this August. And during the past fiscal year alone, U.S. law enforcement seized over 100,000 pounds of cocaine, 83,000 pounds of meth, 2,700 pounds of fentanyl, and more.

**Illegal immigration hurts everyone.** It empowers criminals, bankrolls human smugglers, and fuels transnational gangs. It costs both legal immigrants and U.S. citizens a shot at the American Dream. It endangers law enforcement officers, makes our communities less stable, and puts law-abiding workers and businesses at a disadvantage.

**Open borders** would make all of these problems worse and destroy Americans’ trust in their government. A safe, strong country needs a safe, strong immigration system.

**🎬**[**WATCH: The wall is going up—and drugs and crime are going down!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3ab4499444&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **President Trump: America’s seniors will be first in line for a safe, effective vaccine!**

**President Trump spoke in Florida** on Friday at an event on protecting America’s seniors—ensuring that they receive the care, respect, and support they deserve.

**“I will protect you,** I will defend you, and I will fight for you with every ounce of energy and conviction that I have,” President Trump said. “You devoted your life to this country, and I am devoting my life to you.”

**🎬** [**WATCH: Seniors would pay the price for a left-wing agenda**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=afad7088d4&e=3ee4985eea)

**Average Medicare premiums** have dropped by 34% since President Trump took office. Some states have experienced price reductions of over 50% or more. Medicare prescription drug prices have also declined, with premiums down 12% on average.

**“I stood up to big pharma** , and that’s not easy,” President Trump said. “They got big money. They’re the biggest lobbyists in this country, by far. And I signed an executive order implementing a ‘most favored nations’ policy for the United States,” which ensures that Medicare [**won’t pay more than other countries**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d427af92af&e=3ee4985eea) for important drugs.

**After Coronavirus spread** from China across the world, the Trump Administration went to work holding Beijing and the World Health Organization accountable for their failures while protecting the American people from both economic and physical harm.

**“I’m moving heaven and earth** to safeguard our seniors from the China Virus, to deliver lifesaving therapies in record time, and to distribute a safe and effective vaccine before the end of the year,” President Trump said.

**“You’re the generation** that defeated fascism and triumphed over communism, sent American astronauts to the Moon. You built our country into the greatest and most powerful nation the world has ever known.”

**Our seniors** remind us of the extraordinary American legacy that President Trump is fighting to protect.

**🎬**[**America’s seniors will be first in line for a safe, effective vaccine!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=38b09d86d2&e=3ee4985eea)

**🎬**[**President Trump: I will protect, defend, and fight for you!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cc275b69d4&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump disembarks Air Force One in Muskegon, Michigan** | October 17, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6d6009206b&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7d53e6c1d5&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=4cf90f65b2)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

Peter,

Republicans have few offensive opportunities this year – and quite frankly, one of the best shots our Party has to flip a House seat this cycle is the seat I’m running for in Oregon.

ICYMI – _Politico_ released an article last week which really captures the mood here on the ground in Oregon: **_“senior Democrats have grown nervous and officials acknowledge the race will be closer than they’d like.”_**

| [**Help Me
Take Down a Dem Chairman** **› › **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6bfb7c36f86344e3b913cf77b6add775&_e=IZQg7bsqsu4yyUIUEevYO2JMFijFndYFwcxSnh1-I6QcNPJ07JTSCCzhd6kySwjpnGlq3A03mpApgJG_3hYdgpbITp6b6C2ObRcL6YYw7Eu5gY0XG_8yDA-l4HPEewLmkUbMd7SFTVpEtSCrOdzmSLX3ukljmIx4DzXI4A1S2ksUqKl6L8E-H34Htu_XfOK7hInbVEkRheKEs1v2yF_1XqDXPZPjuiTBOqjePNqau1Xagjd9Ubmy4uTyejYGS7441BRXL2iWWq1vN8OuhzdqjnF4T2p7qUKsQ8F9tPaf6pa0j2_GtpHf7lAi-WZ9LuaZKURHgkd-HcXT7UDL6U0whA%3D%3D)
---

My opponent recognized that I am the guy who has the best shot at sending him into retirement, so he dialed up Nancy Pelosi and asked her to send in some air support. Of course, she acquiesced, and now **our best estimates put Democrats’ total spending in this race at more than $2.6 million.** DeFazio is one of their MVPs and they’re going to do everything they can to defeat me in 15 short days.

**[I’m going to lose this race if we can’t match their spending dollar-for-dollar. Please, I too need some air support. It’s now or never.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6bfb7c36f86344e3b913cf77b6add775&_e=IZQg7bsqsu4yyUIUEevYO2JMFijFndYFwcxSnh1-I6QcNPJ07JTSCCzhd6kySwjpnGlq3A03mpApgJG_3hYdgpbITp6b6C2ObRcL6YYw7Eu5gY0XG_8yDA-l4HPEewLmnKOHNQNc8hmqFUwO7pFdjx8F22lMIwiLnO0uD7uZCDoCGZg4sK7RDnmIJx2G_EyR3W5Bt0oZfNnfa2gbm0Xq1VQN018UxoovsYrXM6rbhE68Opx7ziwNsPxXBDsllKef6hs-OGSana1ffGG2NfXhz4l2RyjF8QjbJgfKu_8U2tQmtWWNIj25S2zrVw1Th2A-0LV9ZEzNy8ojBoEMMm7qvw%3D%3D)**

[**Donate To My Victory Fund** **› › **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6bfb7c36f86344e3b913cf77b6add775&_e=IZQg7bsqsu4yyUIUEevYO2JMFijFndYFwcxSnh1-I6QcNPJ07JTSCCzhd6kySwjpnGlq3A03mpApgJG_3hYdgpbITp6b6C2ObRcL6YYw7Eu5gY0XG_8yDA-l4HPEewLm5Ptq_Nw3LP7miDhC6Z4M8jrHMRDo-Jo5J63NDg0BKrVBJMxn9GqU3LeMIsK1qFo3BvaaESB-UjgqODTcRN3G38kl-k2U2ftSl212NARiA_y7oi1lbQheWlD8K3PeVqiTLotYNVwYp_OK-YtQa5ostyle7gfL-lJlQTQivWjNZWoQ0AoTCF-POTYIuT_rDo0kIaeBBRhH-e_X-UgT9aGtag%3D%3D)
---

From the very beginning, this campaign has been built on the generosity of small-dollar donors, and that is how I plan to finish it. **Your support** has enabled us to nationalize this race and force Nancy Pelosi and national Democrats to spend big bucks in defense of my opponent.

We have Democrats on the run – but **my fundraising numbers seems to be stalling out at the worst possible time** ; I just checked and we’re a full $55,000 behind where we were at this point in September.

As a personal favor to me, **[would you please consider making a gift of any amount to my campaign right now to help us get back on track?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6bfb7c36f86344e3b913cf77b6add775&_e=IZQg7bsqsu4yyUIUEevYO2JMFijFndYFwcxSnh1-I6QcNPJ07JTSCCzhd6kySwjpnGlq3A03mpApgJG_3hYdgpbITp6b6C2ObRcL6YYw7Eu5gY0XG_8yDA-l4HPEewLmociJvHicbf8Caa9q5_nFeGS3YFTXfGPzfbzeSk5oWOEZMnxfQ7za4T4GKTMyjZqdQTF3QRjRZaKzICutjV3o4lqnsHPLbAelKxLe_aAiroCuHe0ZWTE8EmgHhr5nwi5Gg0e_9G1i_84-ccrRJKiIE3q3Xy2p3xAj6ego5r99AJ3jeUKSmC4yyL4lJ8SqXLtpfiaydpHHNfa4cRsE-5HlXA%3D%3D)**

body:
AOC and her Squad know if we beat her, their entire Leftist racket will collapse like a House of Cards. AOC and her Squad know if we beat her, their entire Leftist racket will collapse like a House of Cards.
| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=36a0158c4e994f5086e3661c43cd0582&_e=Eo6rqQ_HjWxV0AtVY8nY9au66KyDl_iGMxgih3zMfQNp8G2DL2i0TN-wHbXz3CeZ598LhAwSY2tF-QMXlbE_HakWbhyJHsR46lGieHVRgaHG_ZGgMbKCOA7Bx4WqMebTPdk8zFQBVwYjkzr4SEPwLVi8AOBGlkhjjcf4mI35Bk8G1eF1rJ5XXmK6rlDsSgoBteoPuOIQsSJa4xyM_J0fau1ZGU3-3wayG36Hd0zJQPg5uAhsB-MOmFe372ZlABDoOnSdK4dmKCBhDCqX-qcvKZygfQTpAeY6IpwCaOSJIn3xPKJ1d-Dw9WUJezWUfji3PI2BsrWtLOf3vg5skxjIzm8NAEfOcEKHRNsg1_RzqNGkyJDe8k68z3ov97dJHH_SctIUPovoWz3_NMi3Di2NLg%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

The liberal media said AOC was unstoppable, they boasted about her being the leading voice of her generation, they claimed her Squad would change the country.

subject: Two Weeks: Update from the field
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | Friend,
---
| We have less than three weeks until Election Day 2020 – only 15 days!

Team Feenstra isn’t taking any day for granted. We’ve spent the past month attending meetings, walking main streets, knocking doors, making phone calls, and attending events where we can reach patriots that care about the future of our country. Our team has driven over 15,000 miles and delivered yard signs and barn signs to all 39 counties in the district.

As we’re traveling across the district and speaking with the people we meet, we hear one thing more than anything else: _we can’t let the liberal left and JD Scholten win this seat._

We are working **every day** to make sure that doesn’t happen.

Travelling across Iowa and keeping our team on the road isn’t cheap though. As we make our final push before Election Day, would you be willing to chip in $15 for a tank of gas to keep our cars running across the district?
---
| [Click here to help out!](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=a7792db7fc&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Click here to help out!")
---
| Thank you,

Emily Schwickerath
_Political Director
Feenstra For Congress_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: "Momma, I'm ready for more stickers"
body:
The pandemic has exacerbated a lot of problems, many of which aren’t news to those of us who live with these problems day in and day out. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/00151a6e6666/momma-im-ready-for-more-stickers?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
The pandemic has exacerbated a lot of problems, many of which aren’t news to those of us who live with these problems day in and day out.

I’m a working parent with two school-aged kids. I’m lucky to have a support network and a flexible (though demanding!) work schedule. When schools shut down this spring, I scrambled to figure out how to parent my kids while also running for Congress (and doing the dishes, and making meals, and scheduling doctors’ appointments, and keeping track of grocery lists, and returning library books, and on and on and on). This picture is what it often looks like. Me working at the kitchen table, little helpers by my side.

My family is lucky. Many others are in much more difficult positions, struggling to keep jobs and raise kids in a whole host of circumstances. The pandemic has made being a working parent harder, but the challenges parents face aren’t new.

Women shoulder the overwhelming majority of parenting in the United States, and so it is women who suffer most from poor policymaking related to supporting parents.

We need protections and resources for families: paid family leave, universal pre-k, and affordable, quality childcare. Supporting families empowers women and provides critical opportunities not just for career growth, but broader economic growth as well.

When I’m in Congress, those are exactly the kinds of policies I’ll champion. [Can you chip in today to help me get there? ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=4f351c46bc&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani

clean_body: I’m sharing this with you because you got us to where we are today. | Friend, Because you’ve been a trusted member of our campaign, I wanted to share with you an internal poll we just conducted. I am now tied - within the margin of error - with Democrat Lizzie Fletcher. ...And 7% of voters are still undecided. With early voting already happening in Texas, we’re racing against the clock to take the lead. Because we’ve worked so hard to come this far, we need to make sure we do everything we can to surge ahead, so I’ve secured a 3X-MATCH for the next HOUR. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Captain, U.S. Army Aviation Branch Official Republican Nominee for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress.
